trait.name: Subdermal Plating
entries: {@variantrule Critical Hit|XPHB} scored against Andora become normal hits.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Andora makes two Slam attacks.

action.name: Slam
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}9 ({@damage 1d10 + 4}) Force damage plus 2 ({@damage 1d4}) Lightning damage, and the target has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

reaction.name: She's Alive!
entries: {@actTrigger} Andora takes Lightning damage. {@actResponse} Andora gains {@variantrule Temporary Hit Points|XPHB} equal to the Lightning damage dealt.

trait.name: Artificial Form
entries: The clockwork horror has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws to avoid or end the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition and has {@variantrule Immunity|XPHB} to disease. It does not need to eat, drink, sleep, or breathe.

trait.name: Chain the Beast
entries: When the clockwork horror is reduced to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}, it transforms back into {@creature Llanna Deyern|GrimHollowMG24}.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The clockwork horror makes a Gore attack and two Slam attacks.

action.name: Gore
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 10 ft. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d10 + 3}) Piercing damage.

action.name: Slam
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 10 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}) Bludgeoning damage.

trait.name: Artificial Form
entries: Llanna has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws to avoid or end the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition and has {@variantrule Immunity|XPHB} to disease. She does not need to eat, drink, sleep, or breathe

trait.name: Defense Mechanism
entries: When Llanna is reduced to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}, she uses Unchain the Beast, if able. At the end of the duration, she has the {@condition Unconscious|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Multiattack.
entries: Llanna makes two attacks using Dagger.

action.name: Dagger
entries: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 4} to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one creature. {@h}4 ({@damage 1d4 + 2}) Piercing damage.

action.name: Faerie Glamour
entries: Llanna casts {@spell Disguise Self|XPHB}, appearing as a fleshand-blood half-elf child.

bonus.name: Unchain the Beast (Recharges after a Short or Long Rest)
entries: Llanna transforms into the Clockwork Horror for 1 minute. Her {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} are replaced by those of the clockwork horror until the duration ends.

trait.name: Dwarven Resilience
entries: Gillian has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws to avoid or end the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition.

trait.name: Heavy Hitter
entries: Gillian's {@variantrule Unarmed Strike|XPHB} score a {@variantrule Critical Hit|XPHB} on a roll of 19 or 20 on the d20.

trait.name: Innate Toughness
entries: Gillian can add her Constitution modifier to her {@variantrule Armor Class|XPHB|AC} instead of her Dexterity modifier (included above).

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Gillian makes two {@variantrule Unarmed Strike|XPHB}, or three {@variantrule Unarmed Strike|XPHB} if she has the {@status Bloodied|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Unarmed Strike
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}) Bludgeoning damage.

reaction.name: Now I'm Angry (Recharges after a Long Rest)
entries: {@actTrigger} Gillian becomes {@status Bloodied|XPHB}. {@actResponse} Gillian gains {@variantrule Temporary Hit Points|XPHB} equal to half her {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} maximum, which last for 10 minutes. While she has these {@variantrule Temporary Hit Points|XPHB}, she has {@variantrule Resistance|XPHB} to Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing damage.

trait.name: Lasting Curse
entries: If Claunt is restored to his original form by a {@spell Remove Curse|XPHB} spell or similar magic, he returns to his porcine form the next time he finishes a {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}. Only a {@spell Wish|XPHB} spell, or slaying the spellcaster that cursed him, can permanently remove the curse.

action.name: Shortsword
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 3} to hit, reach 5 ft. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d6 + 2}) Piercing damage.

action.name: Blackpowder Pistol
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 3} to hit, range 25/100 ft. {@h}6 ({@damage 2d4 + 1}) Piercing damage plus 4 ({@damage 1d8}) Fire damage.

action.name: Satchel of Sorcerous Sales
entries: Claunt reaches into his satchel, dropping in any number of gold pieces to withdraw a nonmagical item with a value equal to or less than the deposited sum. {@item Gold|XDMG} deposited into the satchel goes directly into Gorodyn's infernal treasury. In addition to nonmagical items, Claunt can also purchase the following potions from his satchel: {@item Potion of Climbing|XDMG} (50 GP), {@item Potion of Healing|XDMG} (25 GP), {@item Potion of Greater Healing|XDMG} (100 GP), {@item Potion of Resistance|XDMG} (200 GP), and {@item Potion of Water Breathing|XDMG|Potion of Waterbreathing} (200 GP). Only Claunt can attune to this item.

reaction.name: Enlightened Self-Interest
entries: Claunt takes the {@action Dash|XPHB} or {@action Disengage|XPHB} action.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: Abree casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 12}):

trait.name: Smite
entries: When Abree hits a creature with a melee weapon attack, she can expend a spell from her Spellcasting action. The spell has no effect, and the attack deals an extra 9 ({@damage 2d8}) Radiant damage for a 2/Day spell or 18 ({@damage 4d8}) Radiant damage for a 1/Day spell.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Abree makes two attacks, using Dagger or Vile Spit in any combination.

action.name: Dagger
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4} to hit, reach 5 ft. {@h}4 ({@damage 1d4 + 2}) Piercing damage plus 2 ({@damage 1d4}) Necrotic damage.

action.name: Vile Spit
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 13}, one creature Abree can see within 30 feet. {@actSaveFail} 2 ({@damage 1d4}) Poison damage and the target {@condition Blinded|XPHB} until the end of its next turn.

bonus.name: Hunter's Mark (2/Day)
entries: Abree casts {@spell Hunter's Mark|XPHB} using the spellcasting ability in Spellcasting.

bonus.name: Inquisitor's Eye (Recharges after a Long Rest)
entries: Abree grants herself {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on Intelligence ({@skill Investigation|XPHB}), Wisdom ({@skill Insight|XPHB}), and Wisdom ({@skill Perception|XPHB}) checks for 10 minutes.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: Grimaldo casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 13}, {@hit 5} to spell attacks):

trait.name: Bloody Brilliant
entries: Grimaldo has a pool of seven {@dice 7d12|d12s}. Whenever he casts a sangromancy spell that calls for the expenditure of a {@variantrule Hit Point Dice|XPHB|Hit Die}, he can spend an equal number of these d12s instead.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Grimaldo makes two Necrosis attacks.

action.name: Bejeweled Dagger
entries: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 4} to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one creature. {@h}4 ({@damage 1d4 + 2}) Piercing damage.

action.name: Necrosis
entries: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 60 ft. {@h}13 ({@damage 3d8}) Necrotic damage, and the target can't regain {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} until the start of Grimaldo's next turn.

bonus.name: Blood Magic (4/Day)
entries: Grimaldo casts {@spell Blood Rush|GrimHollowPG24} (level 2 version), {@spell Crimson Lash|GrimHollowPG24}, or {@spell Wilting Smite|GrimHollowPG24} using the spellcasting ability in Spellcasting.

monster.name: Ancient Blightscale Dragon

trait.name: Accursed Death
entries: {@actSave con}: {@dc 22}, each creature in a 30-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the dragon when it dies. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition. At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats its save, ending the effect on itself on a success. It automatically succeeds after 1 minute.

However, a target that fails two saves is cursed. While cursed, the target can't regain Hit Points. Upon being cursed and every 24 hours thereafter, the target takes 22 ({@damage 4d10}) Necrotic damage, can't regain {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}, and its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the Necrotic damage taken. If this effect reduces the target's {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} maximum to 0, it dies.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (4/Day or 5/Day in Lair)
entries: If the dragon fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The dragon uses Sickening Presence, then makes three Rend attacks.

action.name: Rend
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 15} to hit, reach 15 ft. {@h}17 ({@damage 2d8 + 8}) Force damage plus 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Necrotic damage.

action.name: Sickening Presence
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 22}, each creature in a 60-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the dragon. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition until the end of the dragon's next turn. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to Sickening Presence for 1 hour.

action.name: Swarm Breath {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 22}, each creature in a 90-foot {@variantrule Cone [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cone}. {@actSaveFail} 35 ({@damage 10d6}) Piercing damage plus 42 ({@damage 12d6}) Poison damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

legendaryHeader: Legendary Action Uses: 3 (4 in Lair). Immediately after another creature's turn, the dragon can expend a use to take one of the following actions. The dragon regains all expended uses at the start of each of its turns.

legendary.name: Bursting Pus
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 22}, each creature in a 30-footlong, 5-foot-wide {@variantrule Line [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Line}. {@actSaveFail} The target is covered in eye-watering pus. It has the {@condition Blinded|XPHB} condition and can't ingest anything until a creature takes an action to scrub off the pus. The effect ends early if the creature is doused or submerged in water. {@actSaveSuccessOrFail} The dragon can't use this action again until the start of its next turn.

legendary.name: Tail Swipe
entries: The dragon makes one Rend attack.

legendary.name: Take Flight
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 22}, each creature in a 20-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the dragon. {@actSaveFail} The target takes 17 ({@damage 2d8 + 8}) Bludgeoning damage and has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition. {@actSaveSuccessOrFail} The dragon flies up to half its {@variantrule Fly Speed|XPHB}. The dragon can't use this action again until the start of its next turn.

entries: {@actSave con}: {@dc 19}, each creature in a 20-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the dragon when it dies. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition. If this effect reduces the target's {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} maximum to 0, it dies.

entries: The dragon uses Sickening Presence, then makes three Rend attacks.

action.name: Rend
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 11} to hit, reach 10 ft. {@h}15 ({@damage 2d8 + 6}) Force damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Necrotic damage.

If this effect reduces the target's {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} maximum to 0, it dies.

entries: The dragon makes three Rend attacks.

action.name: Rend
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 10 ft. {@h}11 ({@damage 2d6 +4}) Force damage plus 5 ({@damage 2d4}) Necrotic damage.

action.name: Swarm Breath {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 15}, each creature in a 30-foot {@variantrule Cone [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cone}. {@actSaveFail} 14 ({@damage 4d6}) Piercing damage plus 28 ({@damage 8d6}) Poison damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

entries: {@actSave con}: {@dc 12}, each creature in a 30-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the dragon when it dies. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition. If this effect reduces the target's {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} maximum to 0, it dies.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The dragon makes three Rend attacks.

action.name: Rend
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 10 ft. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d10 +3}) Force damage plus 2 ({@damage 1d4}) Necrotic damage.

action.name: Swarm Breath {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 12}, each creature in a 30-foot {@variantrule Cone [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cone}. {@actSaveFail} 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Piercing damage plus 14 ({@damage 4d6}) Poison damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

trait.name: Muddled Thoughts
entries: Although a young snarite cannot control the actions of its host, it can cloud a host's thoughts, inclining the host to make poor or irrational decisions. The host also refuses to cut their hair, thus saving the young snarite from harm.

trait.name: Wisdom Drinker
entries: After being infected by a young snarite for a year, the host is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave wis} {@dc 10}. {@actSaveFail} The target's Wisdom score is permanently reduced by 2.

action.name: Tail
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d4 + 3}) Slashing damage.

trait.name: Muddled Thoughts
entries: Although an adult snarite cannot control the actions of its host, it can cloud a host's thoughts, inclining the host to make poor or irrational decisions. The host also refuses to cut their hair, thus saving the adult snarite from harm.

trait.name: Wisdom Drinker
entries: After being infected by a young snarite for a year, the host is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave wis} {@dc 11}. {@actSaveFail} The target's Wisdom score is permanently reduced by 2.

action.name: Tail
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5 ft. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d4 + 4}) Slashing damage.

reaction.name: Deflect Damage
entries: {@actTrigger} The adult snarite is hit with a melee attack. {@actResponse} The adult snarite deflects the damage onto its host instead.

trait.name: Muddled Thoughts
entries: Although an old snarite cannot control the actions of its host, it can cloud a host's thoughts, inclining the host to make poor or irrational decisions. The host also refuses to cut their hair, thus saving the old snarite from harm.

trait.name: Wisdom Drinker
entries: After being infected by a young snarite for a year, the host is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave wis} {@dc 13}. {@actSaveFail} The target's Wisdom score is permanently reduced by 2.

action.name: Tail
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5 ft. {@h}11 ({@damage 3d4 + 4}) Slashing damage, and the target is {@condition Grappled|XPHB} (escape {@dc 13}). While {@condition Grappled|XPHB}, the creature is {@condition Restrained|XPHB}. A target that begins its turn {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by the old snarite take 11 ({@damage 3d4 + 4}) Slashing damage and is infected with 2 ({@dice 1d4}) {@creature Young Snarite|GrimHollowMG24|Young Snarites}.

reaction.name: Deflect Damage
entries: {@actTrigger} The adult snarite is hit with a melee attack. {@actResponse} The adult snarite deflects the damage onto its host instead.

trait.name: Regeneration
entries: The vampire regains 10 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} at the start of each of its turns if it has at least 1 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} and isn't in sunlight or running water. If the vampire takes Radiant damage, this trait doesn't function at the start of its next turn.

trait.name: Spider Climb
entries: The vampire can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

trait.name: Vampire Weaknesses
entries: The vampire has the following flaws:
{@i Forbiddance.} The vampire can't enter a residence without an invitation from an occupant.
{@i Running Water.} The vampire takes 20 Acid damage when it ends its turn in running water.
{@i Stake to the Heart.} The vampire dies if a weapon that deals Piercing damage is driven into the vampire's heart while it has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.
{@i Sunlight Hypersensitivity.} The vampire takes 10 Radiant damage when it starts its turn in sunlight. While in sunlight, it has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on attack rolls and ability checks.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The vampire makes two Claw attacks and uses Bite.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5 ft. {@h}10 ({@damage 2d6 + 3}) Slashing damage, and if the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 14}) from one of two claws.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 14}, one creature within 5 feet that is willing or that has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB}, {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB}, or {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition. {@actSaveFail} 5 ({@damage 1d4 + 3}) Piercing damage plus 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Necrotic damage. The target's {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} maximum decreases by an amount equal to the Necrotic damage taken, and the vampire regains {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} equal to that amount.

bonus.name: Deathless Agility
entries: The vampire takes the {@action Dash|XPHB} or {@action Disengage|XPHB} action.

monster.name: Young Vampire

trait.name: Regeneration
entries: The vampire regains 15 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} at the start of each of its turns if it has at least 1 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} and isn't in sunlight. If the vampire takes Radiant damage, this trait doesn't function at the start of its next turn.

trait.name: Spider Climb
entries: The vampire can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

trait.name: Vampire Weaknesses
entries: The vampire has the following flaws:
{@i Forbiddance.} The vampire can't enter a residence without an invitation from an occupant.
{@i Stake to the Heart.} The vampire dies if a weapon that deals Piercing damage is driven into the vampire's heart while it has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition in its resting place.
{@i Sunlight Hypersensitivity.} The vampire takes 15 Radiant damage when it starts its turn in sunlight. While in sunlight, it has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on attack rolls and ability checks.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The vampire makes two Claw attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Bite.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 5 ft. {@h}10 ({@damage 2d6 + 3}) Slashing damage, and if the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 15}) from one of two claws.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 15}, one creature within 5 feet that is willing or that has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB}, {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB}, or {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition. {@actSaveFail} 8 ({@damage 2d4 + 3}) Piercing damage plus 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Necrotic damage. The target's {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} maximum decreases by an amount equal to the Necrotic damage taken, and the vampire regains {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} equal to that amount

action.name: Shape-Shift
entries: If the vampire isn't in sunlight or running water, it shape-shifts into a cloud of mist ({@variantrule Speed|XPHB} 5 ft., {@variantrule Fly Speed|XPHB} 20 ft. [Hover]) or it returns to its vampire form. Anything it is wearing transforms with it. While in mist form, the vampire can't take any {@variantrule Action|XPHB|Actions}, speak, or manipulate objects. It is weightless and can enter an enemy's space and stop there. If air can pass through a space, the mist can do so, but it can't pass through liquid. It has {@variantrule Resistance|XPHB} to all damage, except the damage it takes from sunlight.

reaction.name: Misty Escape
entries: {@actTrigger} The vampire drops to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} outside its resting place. {@actResponse} The vampire uses Shape-Shift to become mist. If it can't use Shape-Shift, it is destroyed.

While it has 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} in mist form, the vampire dies if it takes damage three times or Radiant damage once. It can't return to its vampire form, and it must reach its resting place within 2 hours or be destroyed. Once in its resting place, it returns to its vampire form and has the {@condition Paralyzed|XPHB} condition until it regains any {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}. It regains 1 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} after spending an hour there.

legendaryHeader: Legendary Action Uses: 3 (4 in Lair). Immediately after another creature's turn, the vampire can expend a use to take one of the following actions. The vampire regains all expended uses at the start of each of its turns.

legendary.name: Move
entries: The vampire moves up to its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} without provoking {@action Opportunity Attack|XPHB|Opportunity Attacks}.

legendary.name: Claw
entries: The vampire makes a Claw attack.
