action.name: Bewitch
entries: {@actSave cha} {@dc 15}, one creature the vampire can see within 60 ft. {@actSaveFail} The creature has the {@condition Charmed|XPHB} condition for 1 minute. At the end of 1 minute, it can attempt another saving throw. Second Failed Save: The creature has the {@condition Charmed|XPHB} condition for 1 hour.

action.name: Shape-Shift
entries: If the vampire isn't in sunlight, it shape-shifts into a Medium or smaller beast ({@variantrule Fly Speed|XPHB|Fly} or {@variantrule Swim Speed|XPHB} 30 ft.) or a Medium cloud of mist ({@variantrule Speed|XPHB} 5 ft., {@variantrule Fly Speed|XPHB} 20 ft. [hover]), or it returns to its vampire form. Anything it is wearing transforms with it.

While in beast form, the vampire can't speak. Its game statistics, other than its size and {@variantrule Speed|XPHB}, are unchanged. If its beast form lacks claws, its Claw attacks become Slam attacks that deal Bludgeoning damage instead of Slashing damage.

While in mist form, the vampire can't take any {@variantrule Action|XPHB|Actions}, speak, or manipulate objects. It is weightless and can enter an enemy's space and stop there. If air can pass through a space, the mist can do so, but it can't pass through liquid. It has {@variantrule Resistance|XPHB} to all damage.

reaction.name: Misty Escape
entries: {@actTrigger} The vampire drops to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} outside its resting place. {@actResponse} The vampire uses Shape-Shift to become mist. If it can't use Shape-Shift, it is destroyed.

While it has 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} in mist form, the vampire dies if it takes damage three times or Radiant damage once. It can't return to its vampire form, and it must reach its resting place within 2 hours or be destroyed. Once in its resting place, it returns to its vampire form and has the {@condition Paralyzed|XPHB} condition until it regains any {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}. It regains 1 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} after spending an hour there.

legendaryHeader: Legendary Action Uses: 3 (4 in Lair). Immediately after another creature's turn, the vampire can expend a use to take one of the following actions. The vampire regains all expended uses at the start of each of its turns.

legendary.name: Move
entries: The vampire moves up to its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} without provoking {@action Opportunity Attack|XPHB|Opportunity Attacks}.

legendary.name: Claw
entries: The vampire makes a Claw attack.

monster.name: Ancient Vampire

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day, or 4/Day in Lair)
entries: If the vampire fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Regeneration
entries: The vampire regains 25 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} at the start of its turn if it has at least 1 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point}. If the vampire takes Radiant damage, it regains 10 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} from the next use of this trait instead.

trait.name: Spider Climb
entries: The vampire can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

trait.name: Vampire Weaknesses
entries: The vampire has the following flaws:
{@i Forbiddance.} The vampire can't enter a residence without an invitation from an occupant.
{@i Stake to the Heart.} The vampire dies if a weapon that deals Piercing damage is driven into the vampire's heart while it has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition in its resting place.
{@i Sunlight Hypersensitivity.} The vampire takes 20 Radiant damage when it starts its turn in sunlight. While in sunlight, it has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on attack rolls and ability checks.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The vampire makes three Claw attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Bite.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 11} to hit, reach 5 ft. {@h}15 ({@damage 2d8 + 6}) Slashing damage and 21 ({@damage 6d6}) Necrotic damage, and if the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 19}) from one of two claws.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 19}, one creature within 5 feet that is willing or that has the {@condition Charmed|XPHB}, {@condition Grappled|XPHB}, {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB}, or {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition. {@actSaveFail} 13 ({@damage 2d6 + 6}) Piercing damage plus 17 ({@damage 5d6}) Necrotic damage. The target's {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} maximum decreases by an amount equal to the Necrotic damage taken, and the vampire regains {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} equal to that amount. A Humanoid reduced to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} by this damage and then buried rises the following sunset as a vampire spawn under the vampire's control.

action.name: Bewitch
entries: {@actSave cha} {@dc 17}, one creature the vampire can see within 60 ft. {@actSaveFail} The creature has the {@condition Charmed|XPHB} condition for 1 minute. The vampire's Bite attack does not break the {@condition Charmed|XPHB} condition. At the end of 1 minute, the creature can attempt another saving throw. Second Failed Save: The creature has the {@condition Charmed|XPHB} condition for 24 hours.

action.name: Shape-Shift
entries: If the vampire isn't in sunlight, it shape-shifts into a Medium or smaller beast ({@variantrule Fly Speed|XPHB|Fly} or {@variantrule Swim Speed|XPHB} 30 ft.) or a Medium cloud of mist ({@variantrule Speed|XPHB} 5 ft., {@variantrule Fly Speed|XPHB} 20 ft. [hover]), or it returns to its vampire form. Anything it is wearing transforms with it.

While in beast form, the vampire can't speak. Its game statistics, other than its size and {@variantrule Speed|XPHB}, are unchanged. If its beast form lacks claws, its Claw attacks become Slam attacks that deal Bludgeoning damage instead of Slashing damage.

While in mist form, the vampire can't take any {@variantrule Action|XPHB|Actions}, speak, or manipulate objects. It is weightless and can enter an enemy's space and stop there. If air can pass through a space, the mist can do so, but it can't pass through liquid. It has {@variantrule Resistance|XPHB} to all damage.

reaction.name: Misty Escape
entries: {@actTrigger} The vampire drops to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} outside its resting place. {@actResponse} The vampire uses Shape-Shift to become mist. If it can't use Shape-Shift, it is destroyed.

While it has 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} in mist form, the vampire dies if it takes damage three times or Radiant damage once. It can't return to its vampire form, and it must reach its resting place within 2 hours or be destroyed. Once in its resting place, it returns to its vampire form and has the {@condition Paralyzed|XPHB} condition until it regains any {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}. It regains 1 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} after spending an hour there.

legendaryHeader: Legendary Action Uses: 3 (4 in Lair). Immediately after another creature's turn, the vampire can expend a use to take one of the following actions. The vampire regains all expended uses at the start of each of its turns.

legendary.name: Move
entries: The vampire moves up to its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} without provoking {@action Opportunity Attack|XPHB|Opportunity Attacks}.

legendary.name: Claw
entries: The vampire makes a Claw attack.

legendary.name: Bite (1/Round)
entries: The vampire uses Bite.

legendary.name: Purify Blood (1/Round).
entries: Even if the vampire can't take actions, it ends one condition affecting it.

monster.name: Bugbear Vampire

items.name: Clawing Lunge (1/Turn)
entries: As part of a Claw attack, the vampire extends its reach by 5 feet.

items.name: Reckless
entries: At the start of its turn, the vampire can gain {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on melee attack rolls until the start of its next turn, but attack rolls against it have {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} until then.

items.name: Multiattack
entries: The vampire makes two Claw attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Bite.

items.name: Claw
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 8} to hit, reach 5 ft. {@h}18 ({@damage 4d6 + 4}) Slashing damage, and if the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 16}) from one of two claws.

items.name: Bite
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 16}, one creature within 5 feet that is willing or that has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB}, {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB}, or {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition. {@actSaveFail} 9 ({@damage 2d4 + 4}) Piercing damage plus 10 (3d6) Necrotic damage. The target's {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} maximum decreases by an amount equal to the Necrotic damage taken, and the vampire regains {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} equal to that amount

bonus.name: Rampage
entries: When the vampire reduces a creature to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} with a melee attack, it can move up to half its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} and make a Claw attack or use Bite.

legendaryHeader: Legendary Action Uses: 2 (3 in Lair). Immediately after another creature's turn, the vampire can expend a use to take one of the following actions. The vampire regains all expended uses at the start of each of its turns.

items.name: Regeneration
entries: The vampire regains 15 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} at the start of each of its turns if it has at least 1 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} and isn't in magical {@variantrule Darkness|XPHB} or running water. If the vampire takes Necrotic damage, this trait doesn't function at the start of its next turn.

items.name: Turn Immunity
entries: The vampire has Immunity to effects that turn undead.

items.name: Earthen Escape
entries: The vampire has the following flaws:
{@i Forbiddance.} The vampire can't enter a residence without an invitation from an occupant.
{@i Running Water.} The vampire takes 20 Acid damage when it ends its turn in running water.
{@i Stake to the Heart.} The vampire dies if a weapon that deals Piercing damage is driven into the vampire's heart while it has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

{@i Magical Darkness Sensitivity.} The vampire takes 20 Necrotic damage when it starts its turn in magical {@variantrule Darkness|XPHB}. While in magical {@variantrule Darkness|XPHB}, it has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on attack rolls and ability checks.

items.name: Claw
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 9} to hit, reach 5 ft. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d8 + 4}) Slashing damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Radiant damage. {@actSave con} {@dc 16}. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition for 1 minute. The target can attempt a saving throw at the end of each of its turns to remove the condition. After a successful save, the target is immune to this affect for 24 hours.

items.name: Bite
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 18}, one creature within 5 feet that is willing or that has the {@condition Charmed|XPHB}, {@condition Grappled|XPHB}, {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB}, or {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition. {@actSaveFail} 7 ({@damage 1d6 + 4}) Piercing damage plus 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Necrotic damage. The target's {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} maximum decreases by an amount equal to the Necrotic damage taken, and the vampire regains {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} equal to that amount. A Humanoid reduced to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} by this damage and then buried rises the following sunset as a vampire spawn under the vampire's control.

bonus.name: Sorrowful Dirge
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 16}, one creature within 30 feet of the vampire that can hear it. {@actSaveFail} The target is forced to flee. It uses its Reaction to move its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} as far away from the vampire as it can, and it can't willingly move into a space within 30 feet of it. At the start of each turn, the affected creature must use its action to {@action Dash|XPHB} away from the vampire. If there's nowhere to move, the target uses the {@action Dodge|XPHB} action. The effect lasts for 1 minute or until the target takes damage.
If the target has 3 or fewer {@variantrule Hit Point Dice|XPHB|Hit Dice}, it is reduced to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} and stabilized instead.

monster.name: Dragonborn Vampire (Young)

items.name: Brutal Attacks
entries: When the vampire scores a Critical Hit on a melee attack, it deals an extra die of damage.

items.name: Claw
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 8} to hit, reach 5 ft. {@h}11 ({@damage 2d6 + 4}) Slashing damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Fire damage, and if the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 16}) from one of two claws.

items.name: Bite
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 16}, one creature within 5 feet that is willing or that has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB}, {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB}, or {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition. {@actSaveFail} 9 ({@damage 2d4 + 4}) Piercing damage plus 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Necrotic damage. The target's {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} maximum decreases by an amount equal to the Necrotic damage taken, and the vampire regains {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} equal to that amount

items.name: Breath Weapon {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 16}, each creature in a 15-foot {@variantrule Cone [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cone}. {@actSaveFail} 14 ({@damage 4d6}) Fire damage plus 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Necrotic damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

legendaryHeader: Legendary Action Uses: 2 (3 in Lair). Immediately after another creature's turn, the vampire can expend a use to take one of the following actions. The vampire regains all expended uses at the start of each of its turns.

items.name: Nightmare Walker
entries: To benefit from a {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}, the vampire must touch the dreams of at least one Humanoid within 1 mile. After finishing a {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}, the vampire gains one skill or tool proficiency until the end of its next {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}.

items.name: Multiattack
entries: The vampire makes two Claw attacks and uses Bite or Nightmare Killer.

items.name: Bite
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 17}, one creature within 5 feet that is willing or that has the {@condition Charmed|XPHB}, {@condition Grappled|XPHB}, {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB}, or {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition. {@actSaveFail} 9 ({@damage 2d4 + 4}) Piercing damage plus 14 ({@damage 4d6}) Psychic damage. The target's {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} maximum decreases by an amount equal to the Necrotic damage taken, and the vampire regains {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} equal to that amount. A Humanoid reduced to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} by this damage and then buried rises the following sunset as a vampire spawn under the vampire's control.

items.name: Nightmare Killer {@recharge}
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 16}, one creature the vampire can see within 120 feet. {@actSaveFail} 22 ({@damage 4d10}) Psychic damage, and the target has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition. The target's {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} maximum decreases by an amount equal to the Psychic damage taken, and the vampire regains {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} equal to that amount.

While {@condition Frightened|XPHB}, the target is immersed in an illusory dreamscape in which the vampire is a manifestation of the target's fears. If it chooses, the vampire can prevent the target from sensing {@variantrule Friendly [Attitude]|XPHB|Friendly} creatures. The target rationalizes any inconsistencies between the real world and the dreamscape.

On its turn, the vampire can forego its Bite and force the target to repeat the save, taking damage again on a failure or ending the effect on itself on a success. Otherwise, the effect lasts for 1 minute, ending early if the vampire dies or ends its turn more than 120 feet from the target.

items.name: Dreamer Escape
entries: {@actTrigger} The vampire drops to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} outside its resting place. {@actResponse} The vampire shape-shifts into a cloud of luminous ectoplasmic vapor ({@variantrule Speed|XPHB} 5 ft., {@variantrule Fly Speed|XPHB} 30 ft. [Hover]) that sheds Dim Light in a 10-foot radius. Anything it is wearing transforms with it. If the vampire can't shape-shift, it is destroyed.

While in vapor form, the vampire can't take any actions, speak, or manipulate objects. It is weightless and can enter an enemy's space and stop there. If air can pass through a space, the mist can do so, but it can't pass through liquid. It has {@variantrule Resistance|XPHB} to all damage, except the damage it takes from sunlight. If the vampire ends its turn inside an object, the vampire dies and returns to its true form, its body merged with the object.

While it has 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} in vapor form, the vampire dies if it takes damage three times or Radiant damage once. It can't return to its vampire form, and it must reach its resting place within 2 hours or be destroyed. Once in its resting place, it returns to its vampire form and has the {@condition Paralyzed|XPHB} condition until it regains any {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}. It regains 1 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} after spending an hour there.

items.name: Earth Glide
entries: The vampire can burrow through nonmagical, unworked earth and any nonmagical stone. While doing so, the vampire doesn't disturb the material it moves through.

items.name: Earthen Escape
entries: The vampire has the following flaws:
{@i Forbiddance.} The vampire can't enter a residence without an invitation from an occupant.
{@i Running Water.} The vampire takes 20 Acid damage when it ends its turn in running water.
{@i Stake to the Heart.} The vampire dies if a weapon that deals Piercing damage is driven into the vampire's heart while it has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.
{@i Sunlight Hypersensitivity.} The vampire takes 15 Radiant damage when it starts its turn in sunlight. While in sunlight, it has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on attack rolls and ability checks.

items.name: Earthen Escape
entries: {@actTrigger} The vampire drops to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} outside its resting place. {@actResponse} The vampire sinks into nonmagical unworked earth or any nonmagical stone. The substance must be large enough to hold the vampire's body and must be within 50 feet of the vampire. If the vampire can't meld with earth or stone, it is destroyed

Once within the earth or stone, the vampire has the {@condition Paralyzed|XPHB} condition until it regains any {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}. The vampire can only hear what's going on beyond the earth or stone and makes Wisdom (Perception) checks to do so with {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB}. It regains 1 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} after spending an hour there.
If the earth or stone is damaged and becomes too small to hold the vampire, the vampire is destroyed and its body is expelled into the nearest unoccupied space.

items.name: Multiattack
entries: The vampire makes three Claw attacks and uses Bite.

items.name: Claw
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 11} to hit, reach 5 ft. {@h}15 ({@damage 2d8 + 6}) Slashing damage and if the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 19}) from one of two claws.

items.name: Fey Majesty
entries: The vampire casts Dominate Person, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 17}), and the duration is 24 hours. The target is a willing recipient of the vampire's Bite, the damage of which doesn't end the spell. While within 300 feet of the target, the vampire can communicate telepathically with it.

Each time the vampire or the vampire's allies do anything harmful to the target, it repeats the save, ending the effect on a success. The effect ends early if the vampire dies, is on a different plane of existence than the target, or takes a {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB} to end the effect.

items.name: Move and Claw
entries: The vampire moves up to its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} and makes a Claw attack.

bonus.name: Distressing Whispers
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 17}, one creature within 300 feet of the vampire. {@actSaveFail} The target is A) filled with despair and has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on attack rolls and ability checks, or B) confused, as with the Confusion spell. At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats the save, ending the effect on itself on a success. It automatically succeeds after 1 minute.

items.name: Speak with Beasts
entries: The vampire can communicate with Beasts as if they shared a language.

items.name: Turn Resistance
entries: The vampire has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against any effect that turns undead.

items.name: Multiattack
entries: The vampire makes two Claw attacks and uses Bite. It can replace one Claw attack with a use of Trip.

items.name: Claw
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 9} to hit, reach 5 ft. {@h}11 ({@damage 2d6 + 4}) Slashing damage, and if the target is a Medium or smaller creature and both Claw attacks hit, it has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

items.name: Trip
entries: {@actSave str} {@dc 17}, one creature within 5 feet of the vampire. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

items.name: Command Beasts
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 15}, up to three Beasts that can hear or see the vampire within 30 feet of it. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Charmed|XPHB} condition. While {@condition Charmed|XPHB}, the target sees the vampire as a leader to be heeded and protected, following its verbal commands and acting in its interest even when left without a command.

Each time the vampire or the vampire's allies do anything harmful to a target, it repeats the save, ending the effect on itself on a success. Otherwise, the effect lasts 24 hours or until the vampire dies, is on a different plane of existence than the target, or takes a {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB} to end the effect.

items.name: Nimble Stealth
entries: The vampire can move through the space of any creature larger than it. Also, the vampire can attempt to {@action Hide|XPHB} when obscured by a creature at least one size larger than it.

items.name: Claw
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 8} to hit, reach 5 ft. {@h}18 ({@damage 4d6 + 4}) Slashing damage, and the vampire has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on the next attack before the end of its turn.

items.name: Bite
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 16}, one creature within 5 feet that is willing or that has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB}, {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB}, or {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition. {@actSaveFail} 9 ({@damage 2d4 + 4}) Piercing damage plus 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Necrotic damage. The target's {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} maximum decreases by an amount equal to the Necrotic damage taken, and the vampire regains {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} equal to that amount

items.name: Innocent Eyes
entries: {@actTrigger} A creature within 30 feet of the vampire that can see it targets it with an attack or harmful effect that affects only the vampire. {@actResponse}—{@actSave wis} {@dc 14} (the target benefits from any traits that help it avoid the {@condition Charmed|XPHB} condition). {@actSaveFail} The target must choose another target or effect, or lose that use of the attack, spell, or effect. The target can choose not to cast a spell or use an ability rather than lose that use of it. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to this vampire's Innocent Eyes for 24 hours.

items.name: Scurry
entries: The vampire moves up to its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} without provoking {@action Opportunity Attack|XPHB|Opportunity Attacks}. It can also use the {@action Hide|XPHB} action.

bonus.name: Cunning Action
entries: The vampire take the {@action Dash|XPHB}, {@action Disengage|XPHB}, or {@action Hide|XPHB} action.

items.name: Speak with Beasts
entries: The vampire can communicate with Beasts as if they shared a language.

items.name: Water Reliance
entries: After 4 hours without being immersed in water or drinking blood, the vampire takes 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Acid damage, and takes this damage again at the end of every subsequent hour. The vampire can't regain {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} lost in this way until it drinks blood or is immersed in water.

items.name: Shape-Shift
entries: If the vampire isn't in sunlight, it shape-shifts into a Small or smaller terrestrial beast ({@variantrule Fly Speed|XPHB} 30 ft.), a Medium or smaller aquatic beast ({@variantrule Swim Speed|XPHB} 30 ft.), or a Medium cloud of mist ({@variantrule Speed|XPHB} 5 ft., {@variantrule Fly Speed|XPHB} 20 ft. [hover]), or it returns to its vampire form. Anything it is wearing transforms with it.

While in beast form, the vampire can't speak. Its game statistics, other than its size and {@variantrule Speed|XPHB}, are unchanged. If its beast form lacks claws, its Claw attacks become Slam attacks that deal Bludgeoning damage instead of Slashing damage.

While in mist form, the vampire can't take any {@variantrule Action|XPHB|Actions}, speak, or manipulate objects. It is weightless and can enter an enemy's space and stop there. If air can pass through a space, the mist can do so, but it can't pass through liquid. It has {@variantrule Resistance|XPHB} to all damage.

items.name: Massive
entries: The vampire is considered to be one size larger when determining what can grapple it, as well as its carrying capacity and the weight it can push, drag, or lift.

items.name: Charm {@recharge 5}
entries: The vampire casts {@spell Charm Person|XPHB}, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 16}), and the duration is 24 hours. The vampire can also target Beasts with this spell. The {@condition Charmed|XPHB} target is a willing recipient of the vampire's Bite, the damage of which doesn't end the spell. When the spell ends, the target is unaware it was {@condition Charmed|XPHB} by the vampire.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The alchemical berserker makes three Longsword attacks.

action.name: Longsword
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d10 + 3}) Slashing damage.

bonus.name: Battle Draught (3/Day)
entries: The alchemical berserker consumes an unstable chemical compound. For the next minute, the berserker gains two of the following abilities: {@variantrule Resistance|XPHB} to spell damage; {@variantrule Resistance|XPHB} to Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing damage; 20 {@variantrule Temporary Hit Points|XPHB}; or 4 ({@damage 1d8}) extra damage with weapon attacks. Choosing the same ability twice can extend the draught's duration, but has no other effect.

action.name: Longsword
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4} to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d10 + 2}) Slashing damage.

bonus.name: Battle Draught (1/Day)
entries: The marauder consumes an unstable chemical compound. For the next minute, the marauder gains one of the following abilities: {@variantrule Resistance|XPHB} to spell damage; {@variantrule Resistance|XPHB} to Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing damage; or 2 ({@damage 1d4}) extra damage with weapon attacks.

trait.name: Amorphous
entries: The amorphous horror can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch without expending extra movement to do so.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The amorphous horror makes two Slam attacks.

action.name: Slam
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}) Bludgeoning damage plus 9 ({@damage 2d8}) Acid damage.

action.name: Shape-Shift
entries: The amorphous horror shape-shifts into a form that resembles its Small or Medium Humanoid appearance before it became a horror, or it returns to its true form. Other than its size, its game statistics are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed.

reaction.name: Split
entries: {@actTrigger} While the amorphous horror is Medium and has 20+ {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}, it becomes {@status Bloodied|XPHB}. {@actResponse} The amorphous horror splits into two new {@creature Amorphous Horror|GrimHollowMG24|Amorphous Horrors}. Each horror has {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} equal to half the original horror's, rounded down. New horrors are one size smaller than the original horror.

trait.name: False Appearance
entries: While the whipskein horror hides its tendrils from sight, such as under clothing, it is indistinguishable from the ordinary humanoid it once was.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The whipskein horror makes four Tendril attacks. It can replace any attack with a use of Spit.

action.name: Tendril
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4} to hit, reach 10 ft. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d8 + 2}) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is Medium or smaller, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 14}). While {@condition Grappled|XPHB}, the target has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition. The whipskein horror has four tendrils, each of which can grapple one target.

action.name: Spit
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 4} to hit, range 30 ft. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d8 + 2}) Poison damage. {@actSave con} {@dc 12}. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition until the end of the whipskein horror's next turn. Being within 5 feet of a {@variantrule Hostile [Attitude]|XPHB|Hostile} creature doesn't impose {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on the whipskein horror's Spit attack.

action.name: Tendril Dance {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 12}, each creature within 30 feet of the whipskein horror that can see it. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Charmed|XPHB} condition until the end of the whipskein horror's next turn. While {@condition Charmed|XPHB}, the target has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition and a {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} of 0. The effect ends early for the target if it takes damage or if another creature uses an action to shake it out of its stupor.

bonus.name: Wriggle
entries: The whipskein horror extends the duration of its Tendril Dance. Each creature currently {@condition Charmed|XPHB} by the whipskein horror has the {@condition Charmed|XPHB} condition until the end of the whipskein horror's next turn. The whipskein horror can't use Wriggle while it has a creature {@condition Grappled|XPHB}.

monster.name: Shifting Hulk
languages: understands one language but can't speak

trait.name: Aberrant Wound
entries: A creature that takes damage from the shifting hulk's attacks is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave con} {@dc 17}. {@actSaveFail} The target suffers a wound. The target loses 5 ({@damage 2d4}) {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} for each wound it is suffering at the start of each of its turns. A creature can take an action to staunch the wounds, ending this effect with a successful {@dc 10} Wisdom ({@skill Medicine}) check. The wounds also close if the target receives magical healing. Constructs and Undead are immune to this trait.

trait.name: Fast Healing
entries: While it is {@status Bloodied|XPHB}, the shifting hulk regains 10 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} at the start of each of its turns. This trait doesn't function while the shifting hulk has 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}

trait.name: Vicious Critical
entries: When the shifting hulk scores a {@variantrule Critical Hit|XPHB} with an attack, it can roll the attack's damage dice three times instead of twice.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The shifting hulk makes two Claw or Spine attacks and uses Frightening Attacks.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 9} to hit, reach 5 ft. {@h}26 ({@damage 6d6 + 5}) Slashing damage, and the shifting hulk inflicts an Aberrant Wound.

action.name: Spine
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 9} to hit, range 30/60 ft. {@h}23 ({@damage 4d8 + 5}) Piercing damage, and the shifting hulk inflicts an Aberrant Wound.

action.name: Frightening Attacks
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 12}, each creature of the shifting hulk's choice within 30 feet that is aware of the shifting hulk. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition. At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats the save, ending the effect on itself on a success. After 1 minute, it succeeds automatically. Once a creature succeeds on a save or the effect ends for it, it is immune to Frightening Attacks for 24 hours or until it sees the shifting hulk score a Critical Hit.

action.name: Shape-Shift
entries: The shifting hulk shape-shifts into a form that resembles its Small or Medium Humanoid appearance before it became a horror, or it returns to its true form. Its statistics are the same in each form, except for its size. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed.

monster.name: Corpse Walker

resist.note: from nonmagical attacks that aren't silvered

languages: understands languages it knew in life but can't speak

trait.name: Cursed Gaze
entries: A Humanoid that starts its turn within 30 feet of the corpse walker is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave cha} {@dc 14}. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition. At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats the save, with {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} unless it is averting its eyes from the corpse walker. On a success, it ends the effect on itself and is immune to Cursed Gaze for 24 hours.
If the target fails two saves, it is cursed with disturbing thoughts, and can't benefit from {@variantrule Short Rest|XPHB|Short} or {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB} until the curse is removed.

Unless surprised, the target can avert its eyes to avoid the corpse walker's Cursed Gaze. If it does, it can't see the corpse walker until the start of its next turn. If the target looks at the corpse walker in the meantime, it is immediately subjected to Cursed Gaze.

trait.name: Sunlight Hypersensitivity
entries: The corpse walker takes 20 Radiant damage when it starts its turn in sunlight. While in sunlight, it has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on attack rolls and ability checks.

trait.name: Undead Fortitude
entries: If damage reduces the corpse walker to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}, it must make a Constitution saving throw with a DC of 5 plus the damage taken unless the damage is Radiant or from a {@variantrule Critical Hit|XPHB}. {@actSaveSuccess} The corpse walker drops to 1 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} instead.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The corpse walker makes two Slam attacks.

action.name: Slam
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d6 + 4}) Bludgeoning damage plus 5 ({@damage 2d4}) Necrotic damage. {@actSave con} {@dc 14}. {@actSaveFail} The target's {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the Necrotic damage taken, and the corpse walker regains {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} equal to that amount. The reduction lasts until the target finishes a {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}. The target dies if this effect reduces its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} maximum to 0. An Evil Humanoid slain in this way rises 24 hours later as a corpse walker.

resist.note: from nonmagical attacks that aren't silvered

trait.name: Cursed Gaze
entries: A Humanoid that starts its turn within 30 feet of thecorpse walker is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave cha} {@dc 16}. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition. At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats the save, with {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} unless it is averting its eyes from the corpse walker. On a success, it ends the effect on itself and is immune to Cursed Gaze for 24 hours. If the target fails two saves, it is cursed with disturbing thoughts, and can't benefit from {@variantrule Short Rest|XPHB|Short} or {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB} until the curse is removed.

Unless surprised, the target can avert its eyes to avoid the corpse walker's Cursed Gaze. If it does, it can't see the corpse walker until the start of its next turn. If the target looks at the corpse walker in the meantime, it is immediately subjected to Cursed Gaze.

trait.name: Spore Calling
entries: When the corpse walker rolls {@variantrule Initiative|XPHB}, Undead allies within 120 feet come to its aid. Moderate or stronger wind can disperse these spores before they are effective.

trait.name: Spore Fortitude
entries: If damage reduces the corpse walker to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}, it must make a Constitution saving throw with a DC of 5 plus the damage taken unless the damage is Radiant or from a {@variantrule Critical Hit|XPHB}. {@actSaveSuccess} The corpse walker drops to 1 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} instead.

When it drops to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}, the corpse walker transforms into its Spore Cloud form. If it can't transform, it is destroyed. The spores of this cloud deal half their normal damage and can't animate corpses. The corpse walker can't revert to its true form until it has at least 1 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point}. It must reach its resting place within 2 hours or be destroyed. Once in its resting place, it reverts to its normal form and has the {@condition Paralyzed} condition. After 1 hour, it regains 1 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} and loses the {@condition Paralyzed} condition.

If the corpse walker takes damage as a cloud, it makes Constitution saving throws as described above, remaining at 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} on a success. If it fails or can't make the saving throw, it is destroyed.

trait.name: Sunlight Hypersensitivity
entries: The corpse walker takes 10 Radiant damage when it starts its turn in sunlight. While in sunlight, it has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on attack rolls and ability checks.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The corpse walker makes two Slam attacks.

action.name: Slam
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 8} to hit, reach 5 ft. {@h}11 ({@damage 2d6 + 4}) Bludgeoning damage plus 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Necrotic damage. {@actSave con} {@dc 15}. {@actSaveFail} The target's {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the Necrotic damage taken, and the corpse walker regains {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} equal to that amount. The reduction lasts until the target finishes a {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}. The target dies if this effect reduces its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} maximum to 0. An Evil Humanoid slain in this way rises 24 hours later as a corpse walker loyal to the ancient corpse walker.

action.name: Spore Cloud
entries: If the corpse walker isn't in sunlight, it can shape-shift into a cloud of spores or revert to its true form. Anything it is wearing or carrying shape-shifts with it. In cloud form, the corpse walker can't take {@variantrule Action|XPHB|Actions} besides this one and can't speak or manipulate objects. The cloud is weightless, has a {@variantrule Fly Speed|XPHB|Flying Speed} of 20 feet, can Hover, and can enter a {@variantrule Hostile [Attitude]|XPHB|Hostile} creature's space and stop there. The cloud spreads around corners. If air can pass through a space, the cloud can do so without without expending extra movement to do so, but it can't pass through water. It has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on Strength, Dexterity, and Constitution saving throws, except those against wind. The cloud has {@variantrule Immunity|XPHB} to nonmagical damage other than from sunlight.

A creature that starts its turn in the cloud is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave con} {@dc 16}. {@actSaveFail} 13 ({@damage 3d8}) Poison damage plus 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Necrotic damage, and the target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition until the start of its next turn. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage. The corpses of Beasts and Humanoids that the cloud passes over rise 24 hours later as zombies loyal to the corpse walker. If the corpse was an Evil Humanoid, it rises as a corpse walker loyal to the ancient corpse walker. The cloud can animate each corpse once.

trait.name: Harrowed Tunneler
entries: The hurrock can burrow through solid rock at half its {@variantrule Burrow Speed|XPHB} and leaves a 6-foot diameter tunnel in its wake. The tunnel is {@variantrule Difficult Terrain|XPHB}.

trait.name: Rubble Walker
entries: {@variantrule Difficult Terrain|XPHB} composed of rock, rubble, or similar debris doesn't cost the hurrock extra movement.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The hurrock makes one Axe Arm attack and one Beard attack.

action.name: Axe Arm
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft. {@h}10 ({@damage 2d6 + 3}) Slashing damage.

action.name: Beard
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d6 + 3}) Piercing damage.

reaction.name: Parry
entries: {@actTrigger} A creature the hurrock can see hits the hurrock with a melee attack while its shield arm is free. {@actResponse} The hurrock adds 3 to its AC against that attack, possibly causing it to miss.

monster.name: Elder Hurrock
languages: understands Dwarvish and Terran but can't speak

trait.name: Harrowed Tunneler
entries: The elder hurrock can burrow through solid rock at its {@variantrule Borrow Speed|XPHB} and leaves a 6-foot diameter tunnel in its wake. The tunnel is {@variantrule Difficult Terrain|XPHB}.

trait.name: Rubble Walker
entries: {@variantrule Difficult Terrain|XPHB} composed of rock, rubble, or similar debris doesn't cost the elder hurrock extra movement.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The elder hurrock makes one Axe Arm attack, one Beard attack, and one Shield Arm attack.

action.name: Axe Arm
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 10 ft. {@h}14 ({@damage 3d6 + 4}) Slashing damage.

action.name: Beard
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 10 ft. {@h}13 ({@damage 2d8 + 4}) Piercing damage.

action.name: Shield Arm
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 5 ft. {@h}11 ({@damage 2d6 + 4}) Bludgeoning damage, and if the target is Medium or smaller, it has the Prone condition.

reaction.name: Parry
entries: {@actTrigger} A creature the elder hurrock can see hits it with a melee attack while its shield arm is free. {@actResponse} The elder hurrock adds 4 to its AC against that attack, possibly causing it to miss.

trait.name: Harrowed Tunneler
entries: The ancient hurrock can burrow through solid rock at its {@variantrule Borrow Speed|XPHB} and leaves a 6-foot diameter tunnel in its wake. The tunnel is {@variantrule Difficult Terrain|XPHB}.

trait.name: Rubble Walker
entries: {@variantrule Difficult Terrain|XPHB} composed of rock, rubble, or similar debris doesn't cost the ancient hurrock extra movement.

trait.name: Siege Monster
entries: The ancient hurrock deals double damage to objects and structures.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The ancient hurrock makes one Beard attack and two Slam attacks.

action.name: Beard
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 9} to hit, reach 10 ft. {@h}14 ({@damage 2d8 + 5}) Piercing damage, and if the target is Large or smaller, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 17}). When a creature escapes the ancient hurrock's beard, it takes 9 ({@damage 2d8}) Piercing damage. The ancient hurrock can grapple up to two creatures with its beard, but once its beard is full, it can only make Beard attacks against those creatures.

action.name: Slam
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 9} to hit, reach 10 ft. {@h}23 ({@damage 4d8 + 5}) Bludgeoning damage. If the ancient hurrock moved 20+ feet straight toward the target immediately before the hit, the target takes an extra 9 ({@damage 2d8}) Bludgeoning damage and, if it is Large or smaller, has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

trait.name: Celestial Arsenal
entries: The angel of Empyreus's weapon attacks deal an extra 27 ({@damage 5d10}) Radiant damage (included in the attack).

trait.name: Divine Awareness
entries: The Angel of Empyreus knows if it hears a lie.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (4/Day)
entries: If the angel of Empyreus fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The angel of Empyreus makes three {@item Holy Avenger|XDMG} attacks. It can replace any attack with a use of Authoritative Mien.

action.name: Holy Avenger
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 19} to hit, reach 10 ft. {@h}19 ({@damage 4d6 + 12}) Slashing damage plus 27 ({@damage 5d10}) Radiant damage, or 49 ({@damage 9d10}) Radiant damage if the target is a Fiend or Undead.

action.name: Authoritative Mien
entries: The angel of Empyreus casts {@spell Command|XPHB} (spell save {@dc 25}).

action.name: Blazing Radiance {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 25}, each creature in a 60-foot {@variantrule Cone [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cone}. {@actSaveFail} 35 ({@damage 10d6}) Fire damage plus 35 ({@damage 10d6}) Radiant damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

bonus.name: Holy Aura
entries: The angel of Empyreus projects a 60-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} of holiness with one of the effects listed below. The angel of Empyreus chooses which creatures in the area are affected. A target is affected until it leaves the area, dies, or the angel of Empyreus chooses a new effect. Only one effect can be active at a time.

items.name: Judgement
entries: {@actSave cha} {@dc 25}, each creature that starts its turn in the area. {@actSaveFail} The target is overwhelmed by guilt, doubt, remorse, and self-criticism. The target suffers a level of {@condition Exhaustion|XPHB}. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to this effect for 1 hour.

items.name: Valor
entries: Each creature that starts its turn in the area gains 15 {@variantrule Temporary Hit Points|XPHB}, can't have the {@condition Charmed|XPHB} or {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition, and has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

legendary.name: Fly
entries: The angel of Empyreus flies up to half its {@variantrule Fly Speed|XPHB}.

legendary.name: Sword
entries: The angel of Empyreus makes a {@item Holy Avenger|XDMG} attack.

legendary.name: Hurl Sword
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 24}, each creature in a 30-foot long, 5-foot wide {@variantrule Line [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Line}. {@actSaveFail} 23 ({@damage 2d6 + 9}) Slashing damage plus 27 ({@damage 5d10}) Radiant damage, or 49 ({@damage 9d10}) Radiant damage if the target is a Fiend or Undead. {@actSaveSuccessOrFail} The angel of Empyreus can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

legendary.name: Recharge
entries: The angel of Empyreus recharges its Blazing Radiance.

monster.name: Anguisher
languages: understands all languages but can't speak

trait.name: Amorphous
entries: The anguisher can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch without without expending extra movement to do so.

trait.name: Continued Suffering
entries: A creature with an Intelligence score of 4 or higher that dies from the anguisher's attacks spawns a new anguisher in 3 days. Any effect that prevents the target's body from becoming Undead also prevents the emergence of the new anguisher.

trait.name: Frightening Advantage
entries: The anguisher has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on attack rolls against creatures that have the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition. Against such targets, the anguisher scores a {@variantrule Critical Hit|XPHB} on a roll of 18 to 20 on the d20.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The anguisher makes two Anguish attacks.

action.name: Anguish
entries: {@atkr ms,rs} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 60 ft. {@h}13 ({@damage 3d6 + 3}) Psychic damage, and the target has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition until the end of its next turn. The target must use its {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} to move up to its Speed away from the anguisher by the safest route. Movement used during this {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} can't be used during the target's next turn.

action.name: Harrow {@recharge}
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 13}, each creature of the anguisher's choice within 60 feet that is aware of the anguisher. {@actSaveFail} 17 ({@damage 5d6}) Psychic damage, and the target has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition. At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats the save, ending the effect on itself on a success. After 1 minute, it succeeds automatically.

action.name: Invisibility
entries: The anguisher casts {@spell Invisibility|XPHB} on itself, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability.

trait.name: Antimagic Susceptibility
entries: The flame tongue has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition while in the area of an {@spell Antimagic Field|XPHB} spell. If targeted by a {@spell Dispel Magic|XPHB} spell, the flame tongue must succeed on a Constitution saving throw against the caster's spell save DC or have the {@condition Unconscious|XPHB} condition for 1 minute.

trait.name: False Appearance
entries: While the flame tongue remains motionless and isn't flying, it is indistinguishable from a normal sword.

action.name: Rend
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}) Force damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Fire damage.

action.name: Frenzy {@recharge 6}
entries: The flame tongue strikes out in a series of wild but focused attacks. The flame tongue makes two Rend attacks against a single target. Frenzy recharges if the flame tongue takes damage from a spell or cantrip.

reaction.name: Parry and Riposte
entries: {@actTrigger} A creature targets the flame tongue with a melee attack that would hit it. {@actResponse} The flame tongue adds 3 to its AC against the triggering attack. If the attack misses, the flame tongue makes a Rend attack against the attacker, if possible.

trait.name: Antimagic Susceptibility
entries: The apparmarole has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition while in the area of an {@spell Antimagic Field|XPHB} spell. If targeted by a {@spell Dispel Magic|XPHB} spell, the apparmarole must succeed on a Constitution saving throw against the caster's spell save DC or have the {@condition Unconscious|XPHB} condition for 1 minute.

trait.name: Damage Transfer
entries: While grappling a creature, the apparmarole has {@variantrule Resistance|XPHB} to all damage, and the creature {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by the apparmarole takes damage equal to that taken by the apparmarole.

trait.name: False Appearance
entries: While the apparmarole remains motionless and isn't flying, it is indistinguishable from normal clothing.

action.name: Constrict
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft. {@h}If the target is Medium or smaller, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 12}). While {@condition Grappled|XPHB}, it has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} and {@condition Blinded|XPHB} conditions, and takes 4 ({@damage 1d4 + 2}) Bludgeoning damage at the start of each of its turns. The apparmarole can grapple one creature at a time.

action.name: Puppeteer
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 13}, one creature {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by the apparmarole. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Charmed|XPHB} condition for 8 hours. While {@condition Charmed|XPHB}, the target wears the apparmarole, shares a space with it, and loses the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition. The apparmarole and the target have a telepathic link, and the apparmarole can issue the target commands (no action required), which the target does its best to obey.
Each time the target takes damage, it repeats the save. On a success, it ends the effect and pushes the apparmarole into the nearest unoccupied space.

trait.name: Death Burst
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 11}, each creature in a 5-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the tallow toad when it dies. {@actSaveFail} 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Fire damage.

trait.name: Illumination
entries: The tallow toad sheds {@variantrule Dim Light|XPHB} in a 10-foot radius.

trait.name: Water Weakness
entries: If the tallow toad is doused in water or ends its turn submerged in water, it takes 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Acid damage, or 6 Acid damage if the water is soapy.

action.name: Tongue of Flame
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4} to hit, reach 5 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d6 + 2}) Fire damage.

action.name: Spit
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 4} to hit, range 20/60 ft. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d6} + 2) Fire damage. The target takes half the original damage again at the end of its next turn unless a creature uses an action to remove the hot wax first.

monster.name: Chalk Chitterling
languages: None (seems to speak, but it's gibberish)

trait.name: Death Burst
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 11}, each creature in a 5-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the chalk chitterling when it dies. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Blinded|XPHB} condition until the end of its next turn.

trait.name: Distracting Chatter
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 11}, each creature that starts its turn within 30 feet of the chalk chitterling and can hear it. {@actSaveFail} The target can't cast or maintain {@status Concentration|XPHB} on spells until the start of its next turn. Constructs are immune to this trait.

trait.name: Water Weakness
entries: If the chalk chitterling is doused in water or ends its turn submerged in water, it takes 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Acid damage, or 6 Acid damage if the water is soapy.

action.name: Dust Whip
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4} to hit, reach 5 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 2d4 + 2}) Slashing damage.

action.name: Maddening Chatter {@recharge}
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 11}, each creature within 30 feet of the chalk chitterling that can hear it. {@actSaveFail} 5 ({@damage 2d4}) Psychic damage, and the target can't take {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB|Reactions} until the end of the chalk chitterling's next turn. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage. Constructs are immune to this effect.

trait.name: Death Burst
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 12}, each creature in a 5-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the inkfester when it dies. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Blinded|XPHB} condition until the end of its next turn.

trait.name: Flat Form
entries: The inkfester's normal form is a two-dimensional pattern of runes on a flat surface. Until it moves or takes an action, the inkfester is indistinguishable from ink on a surface.

trait.name: Spider Climb
entries: The inkfester can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

trait.name: Water Weakness
entries: If the inkfester is doused in water or ends its turn submerged in water, it takes 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Acid damage, or 6 Acid damage if the water is soapy.

action.name: Fearful Glyphs
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 12}, up to two creatures within 30 feet that can see the inkfester. {@actSaveFail} 8 ({@damage 2d6 + 1}) Psychic damage.

action.name: Consuming Mist
entries: The inkfester takes on the form of a cloud of dark ink. In this form, the inkfester has a {@variantrule Fly Speed|XPHB} of 20 feet and can Hover, and it can occupy a {@variantrule Hostile [Attitude]|XPHB|Hostile} creature's space. It also has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on Strength, Dexterity, and Constitution saving throws and {@variantrule Immunity|XPHB} to nonmagical damage other than from acid or water. Creatures that share a space with the inkfester can't breathe.

A creature that starts its turn in the inkfester's space is subjected to the following effect. {@i Strength or} {@actSave dex} {@dc 12}. {@actSaveFail} 9 ({@damage 2d6 + 2}) Acid damage, and if the target is Larger or smaller, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 12}). {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage only.

A creature within 5 feet of the inkfester can take an action to pull free a creature or object in its space with a successful {@dc 12} Strength ({@skill Athletics}) check. Whether it succeeds or not, the creature takes 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Acid damage.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The seraph casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material or Somatic components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 18}):

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The seraph has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The seraph makes three Scimitar attacks.

action.name: Scimitar
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 10}, reach 5 ft. {@h}12 ({@damage 2d6 + 5}) Force damage, plus 18 ({@damage 4d8}) Radiant damage.

action.name: Shape-Shift
entries: The seraph shape-shifts into a Small or Medium Humanoid or a Large Giant, or reverts to its true form. Other than its size, its game statistics are the same in each form. Objects worn and carried by the seraph change size to match its new form until relinquished or the seraph dies.

action.name: Voice of Avarice
entries: The seraph presents objects of desire, which can be illusions the seraph creates, to creatures of its choice. {@actSave wis} {@dc 18}, each creature within 60 feet of the seraph's choice that can see and hear it. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Charmed|XPHB} condition until the seraph has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition or fails to extend the {@condition Charmed|XPHB} condition as a {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB}.
While {@condition Charmed|XPHB}, the target can't take {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB|Reactions} and can only take the {@action Dash|XPHB} action to approach the seraph by the safest route.

Once within 5 feet of the seraph, it spends its turns staring at the desirable objects. If approaching the seraph would endanger the target, it can repeat the save before doing so. The target also repeat its save if subjected to a harmful effect, if it can't see or hear the seraph, and at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. A target that succeeds on its save is immune to the Voice of Avarice of any avarice seraph for 24 hours.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The seraph casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material or Somatic components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 14}):

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The seraph has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The seraph makes three Scimitar attacks.

action.name: Scimitar
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 5 ft. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d6 + 3}) Force damage plus 9 ({@damage 2d8}) Radiant damage.

action.name: Tempting Call
entries: {@actSave cha} {@dc 14}, one creature within 30 feet that can hear the seraph. {@actSaveFail} The target can't take actions. At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats its save, ending the effect on itself on a success but taking 9 ({@damage 2d8}) Psychic damage on a failure. It automatically succeeds after 1 minute.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The seraph casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material or Somatic components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 13}):

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The seraph has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The seraph makes three attacks using Claw or Tongue in any combination. It can replace one attack with Bite.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 5 ft. {@h}15 ({@damage 2d10 + 4}) Force damage plus 9 ({@damage 2d8}) Radiant damage.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 5 ft. {@h}9 ({@damage 2d4 + 4}) Force damage plus 4 ({@damage 1d8}) Radiant damage.

action.name: Tongue

The target has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 15}) and is pulled into a space within 5 feet of the seraph. While {@condition Grappled|XPHB}, the target has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition and the seraph can't make Tongue attacks or Bite another target.

1: {@spell Create Food and Water|XPHB} (the food is tasty and the seraph can create wine instead of water)

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The seraph has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The seraph makes three attacks using Claw or Tongue in any combination. It can replace one attack with Bite.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 10}, reach 5 ft. {@h}24 ({@damage 3d12 + 5}) Force damage plus 9 ({@damage 2d8}) Radiant damage.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 10}, reach 5 ft. {@h}12 ({@damage 2d6 + 5}) Force damage plus 9 ({@damage 2d8}) Radiant damage.

action.name: Tongue
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 10}, reach 20 ft., one creature. {@h}10 ({@damage 2d4 + 5}) Force damage plus 9 ({@damage 2d8}) Radiant damage. The target has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 18}) and is pulled into a space within 5 feet of the seraph. While {@condition Grappled|XPHB}, the target has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition and the seraph can't make Tongue attacks or Bite another target.

action.name: Swallow
entries: The seraph makes one Bite attack against a Large or smaller creature it has {@condition Grappled|XPHB}. {@h}The target takes the Bite attack's damage, no longer has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition, and is swallowed. While swallowed, the target has the {@condition Blinded|XPHB} and {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition and {@variantrule Cover|XPHB|Total Cover} from effects that originate outside the seraph. It takes 18 ({@damage 4d8}) Acid damage and 9 ({@damage 2d8}) Radiant damage at the start of each of the seraph's turns. The seraph can only have one creature swallowed at a time.

If the seraph takes 35 damage or more on a single turn from a creature inside it, the seraph must succeed on a {@dc 20} Constitution saving throw at the end of that turn or regurgitate the swallowed creature, which lands in a space within 10 feet of the seraph and has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition. If the seraph dies, the swallowed creature no longer has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition and can escape the corpse using 10 feet of movement, exiting with the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The chapped brute has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Sure-Footed
entries: The chapped brute has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on Strength and Dexterity saving throws made to avoid or end the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The chapped brute makes two Tentacle attacks.

action.name: Tentacle
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 8}, reach 15 ft. {@h}18 ({@damage 3d8 + 5}) Bludgeoning damage, and if the target is Medium or smaller, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 16}). While {@condition Grappled|XPHB}, the target has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition, and the chapped brute can't use that tentacle against another target. The chapped brute has two -tentacles, each of which can grapple one target.

action.name: Tentacle Slam
entries: {@actSave str} {@dc 16}, one or two creatures {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by the chapped brute. {@actSaveFail} 18 ({@damage 3d8 + 5}) Bludgeoning damage, and the target has the {@condition Stunned|XPHB} condition until the end of the chapped brute's next turn. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

trait.name: Adaptive Hide
entries: After taking damage, the chapped brute gains {@variantrule Resistance|XPHB} to that type of damage until it takes another type of damage.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The chapped brute has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Unstable Life
entries: At the start of the chapped brute's turn, roll {@dice 1d20}. The abomination regains {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} equal to any even result and loses {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} equal to any odd result. This trait can't reduce the chapped brute below 1 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point}.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The chapped brute makes two Tentacle attacks.

action.name: Tentacle
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 10}, reach 20 ft. {@h}22 ({@damage 3d10 + 6}) Bludgeoning damage, and if the target is Large or smaller, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 18}). While {@condition Grappled|XPHB}, the target has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition, and the chapped brute can't use that tentacle against another target. The chapped brute has four tentacles, each of which can grapple one target.

action.name: Engulf
entries: {@actSave str} {@dc 14}, each creature {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by the chapped brute. {@actSaveFail} The grapple ends and the target is pulled into the chapped brute's body. The target has the {@condition Blinded|XPHB} and {@condition Restrained|XPHB} conditions, is suffocating, and has {@variantrule Cover|XPHB|Total Cover} from effects that originate outside the chapped brute. At the start of each of the chapped brute's turns, the target takes 14 ({@damage 4d6}) Acid damage. The chapped brute can have one Large creature or up to four Medium or smaller creatures engulfed at a time.

The target can escape the chapped brute by taking an action and succeeding on a {@dc 18} Strength ({@skill Athletics}) or Dexterity ({@skill Acrobatics}) check. Escaping the chapped brute costs 10 feet of movement and ejects the target into a space of its choice within 5 feet of the chapped brute. If the chapped brute dies, the target no longer has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition and can escape without using an action or making a check.

If the target dies while engulfed, the chapped brute doesn't roll for Unstable Life at the start of its next turn, instead regaining 20 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}. The targets body breaks up inside the chapped brute and everything the creature was wearing or carrying is expelled.

trait.name: Rampage Aura

The target moves up to half its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} if necessary to reach the creature, taking the safest possible path. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to the Rampage Aura of all rampage gnolls for 1 hour.

trait.name: Aura of Wrath
entries: Provided the red quoxxarie doesn't have the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition, it emits a 30-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} of wrath. Any creature (including another red quoxxarie) that starts its turn in the {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} can grant itself {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on attack rolls until the start of its next turn. Attack rolls against the creature also have {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} until then. If the creature is {@variantrule Hostile [Attitude]|XPHB|Hostile} to the quoxxarie and uses this aura, the creature also has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma checks and saving throws until the start of its next turn.

If the red quoxxarie moved 20+ feet straight toward the target immediately before the hit, the target takes an extra 11 ({@damage 2d10}) damage and, if it is Large or smaller, has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

reaction.name: Get the Horns
entries: {@actTrigger} The red quoxxarie takes 25+ damage in a single turn from a creature outside its reach. {@actResponse} The red quoxxarie takes the {@action Disengage|XPHB} action and moves up to half its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} toward the creature. If it ends this movement adjacent to the creature, it can make a Ram attack against the creature with {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on the attack roll.

trait.name: Aura of Withering
entries: Provided the black quoxxarie doesn't have the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition, it emits a 30-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} of withering energy. Each time a {@variantrule Hostile [Attitude]|XPHB|Hostile} creature takes damage in the {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation}, it takes an extra 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Necrotic damage. The {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} kills tiny inanimate nonmagical plants and damages larger such plants, eventually killing them.

The first time a {@variantrule Hostile [Attitude]|XPHB|Hostile} creature with the {@status Bloodied|XPHB} condition takes damage in the {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation}, it feels horrid thirst and hunger and suffers an {@condition Exhaustion|XPHB} level. If such a creature drops to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} in the {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation}, it suffers another {@condition Exhaustion|XPHB} level. A creature can gain only two {@condition Exhaustion|XPHB} levels from any Aura of Withering in the span of 24 hours.

action.name: Tail
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 8}, reach 10 ft. {@h}13 ({@damage 2d8 + 4}) Bludgeoning damage. {@actSave con} {@dc 16}. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Stunned|XPHB} condition until the start of the quake drake's next turn.

bonus.name: Tremor Aura
entries: The quake drake emits a 20-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} that shakes the earth. Each creature that starts its turn in the {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave dex} {@dc 16} (quake drakes automatically succeed). {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The champion of filth casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 13}, {@hit 5} to spell attacks):

trait.name: Blighted Aura
entries: When a creature within 10 feet of the champion of filth makes a {@variantrule D20 Test|XPHB}, it must roll {@dice 1d4} and subtract the result from its roll. This effect doesn't stack with other Blighted Auras or the {@spell Bane|XPHB} spell.

trait.name: Divine Health
entries: The champion of filth is immune to disease.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The champion of filth makes two Longsword attacks.

action.name: Longsword
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}) Slashing damage plus 9 ({@damage 2d8}) Necrotic damage.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The champion of filth casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 15}, {@hit 7} to spell attacks):

trait.name: Blighted Aura
entries: When a creature within 10 feet of the blightwalker makes a {@variantrule D20 Test|XPHB}, it must roll {@dice 1d6} and subtract the result from its roll. This effect doesn't stack with other Blighted Auras or the {@spell Bane|XPHB} spell.

trait.name: Blighted Contact
entries: A creature that takes Necrotic damage from the blightwalker is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave con} {@dc 15}. {@actSaveFail} The target is afflicted with a rotting disease, taking 9 ({@damage 2d8}) Necrotic damage at the start of each of its turns. At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats the save, ending the effect on itself on a success. It automatically succeeds after 1 minute.

trait.name: Divine Health
entries: The blightwalker is immune to disease.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The blightwalker makes three Longsword attacks.

action.name: Longsword
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 9}, reach 5 ft. {@h}14 ({@damage 2d8 + 5}) Slashing damage plus 13 ({@damage 3d8}) Necrotic damage, and the target is subjected to Blighted Contact.

trait.name: Blight
entries: A creature that touches the blightwind, hits it with a melee attack with 5 feet of it, or shares a space with it is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave con} {@dc 13}. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition until the end of its next turn.

trait.name: Mist Form
entries: The blightwind can move through a creature's space and stop there, and vice versa. The blightwind can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch without expending extra movement to do so.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The blightwind makes two Wind Whip attacks.

action.name: Wind Whip
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 8}, reach 10 ft. {@h}14 ({@damage 2d8 + 5}) Slashing damage plus 4 ({@damage 1d8}) Necrotic damage, and the target is subjected to Blight.

action.name: Blight Vortex {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave str} {@dc 16}, each creature in a 20-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the blightwind. {@actSaveFail} The target is pulled 20 feet straight toward the blightwind. If it would enter another creature's space, it stops moving and both creatures take 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Bludgeoning damage and have the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

If the target enters the blightwind's space, it takes 14 ({@damage 2d8 + 5}) Necrotic damage and is subjected to Blight. If the target fails its saving throw against Blight, it has the {@condition Blinded|XPHB} condition for the same duration.

trait.name: Blight
entries: A creature that touches the bogfoul, hits it with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it, or shares a space with it is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave con} {@dc 14}. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition until the end of its next turn.

trait.name: Freeze
entries: If the bogfoul takes Cold damage, it partially freezes. Its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} is reduced by 20 feet until the end of its next turn.

trait.name: Water Form
entries: The bogfoul can move through a creature's space and stop there, and vice versa. The bogfoul can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch without without expending extra movement to do so.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The bogfoul makes two Slam attacks.

action.name: Slam
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}10 ({@damage 2d6 + 3}) Bludgeoning damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Poison damage, and the target is subjected to Blight.

action.name: Noxious Splash
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 14}, each creature in a 10-foot radius {@variantrule Sphere [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Sphere} centered on a point within 60 feet. The {@variantrule Sphere [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Sphere} spreads around corners. {@actSaveFail} 17 ({@damage 5d6}) Poison damage and the target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition until the end of its next turn.

action.name: Swamp {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 14}, each creature in the bogfoul's space. {@actSaveFail} 10 ({@damage 2d6 + 3}) Bludgeoning damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Poison damage. If the target is Large or smaller, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 14}). While {@condition Grappled|XPHB}, the target has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition and can't breathe unless it can breathe underwater. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is pushed out of the bogfoul's space.

A creature within 5 feet of the bogfoul can pull a creature or object out of it by taking an action and succeeding on a {@dc 14} Strength ({@skill Athletics}) check. Regardless of the result, the creature is subjected to Blight.

trait.name: Blight
entries: A creature that touches the deathmoss or hits it with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave con} {@dc 15}. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition until the end of its next turn.

trait.name: Earth Glide
entries: The deathmoss can burrow through nonmagical, unworked earth and stone. While doing so, it doesn't disturb the material it moves through.

trait.name: False Appearance
entries: While the deathmoss remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from a moss-covered mound.

trait.name: Siege Monster
entries: The deathmoss deals double damage to objects and structures.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The deathmoss makes two Slam attacks. It can replace one attack with Calming Spores.

action.name: Slam
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 5 ft. {@h}13 ({@damage 2d8 + 4}) Bludgeoning damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Necrotic damage, and the target is subjected to Blight. If the target fails its saving throw against Blight, its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the Necrotic damage taken. This reduction lasts until the target finishes a {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}. The target dies if this effect reduces its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} maximum to 0.

action.name: Calming Spores (Recharges after a Short or Long Rest)
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 15}, each creature in a 20-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the deathmoss. The {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} spreads around corners. {@actSaveFail} For 1 minute, the target is {@variantrule Indifferent [Attitude]|XPHB|Indifferent} toward the deathmoss and has no desire to harm it. At the end of each of its turns and whenever the deathmoss harms the target or its allies, the target repeats its save, ending the effect on itself on a success. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is subjected to Blight.

trait.name: Blight
entries: A creature that touches the forgeblight, hits it with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it, or shares a space with it is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave con} {@dc 14}. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition until the end of its next turn.

trait.name: Cinder Form
entries: The forgeblight can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch without expending extra movement to do so. A creature that touches the forgeblight or hits it with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it takes 4 ({@damage 1d8}) Fire damage. In addition, the forgeblight can move through a creature's space and stop there. The first time it enters a creature's space on a turn, that creature takes 4 ({@damage 1d8}) Fire damage.

trait.name: Illumination
entries: The forgeblight sheds {@variantrule Bright Light|XPHB} in a 10-foot radius and {@variantrule Dim Light|XPHB} for an additional 10 feet.

trait.name: Siege Monster
entries: The forgeblight deals double damage to objects and structures.

trait.name: Water Susceptibility
entries: For every 5 feet the forgeblight moves in water, or for every gallon of water splashed on it, it takes 1 Cold damage.

trait.name: Weapon Blight
entries: Any nonmagical weapon that strikes the forgeblight partially burns away. After dealing damage, the weapon takes a permanent and cumulative −1 penalty to damage rolls. If the penalty reaches −5, the weapon is destroyed. Nonmagical ammunition that hits the forgeblight deals damage and is then destroyed.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The forgeblight makes two Slam attacks.

action.name: Slam
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 5 ft. {@h}11 ({@damage 2d6 + 4}) Bludgeoning damage plus 4 ({@damage 1d8}) Fire damage, and the target is exposed to Blight. If the target is wearing nonmagical armor or a shield, it is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave dex} {@dc 14}. {@actSaveFail} 4 ({@damage 1d8}) Fire damage, and the target's armor or shield (target's choice) partially burns away. The armor or shield takes a permanent and cumulative −1 penalty to the {@variantrule Armor Class|XPHB|AC} it offers. Armor reduced to an {@variantrule Armor Class|XPHB|AC} of 10 or a shield that drops to a +0 bonus is destroyed.

action.name: Cinder Burst
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 14}, each creature in a 10- foot radius {@variantrule Sphere [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Sphere} centered on a point within 60 feet.
