The {@variantrule Sphere [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Sphere} spreads around corners. {@actSaveFail} 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Fire damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Poison damage, and the target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition until the end of its next turn. While {@condition Poisoned|XPHB}, the target can't have the {@condition Invisible|XPHB} condition.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The blightworm warlock casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 14}, {@hit 6} to spell attacks):

spellcasting.name: Serpent Tongue (1/Short Rest)
headerEntries: The blightworm warlock casts {@spell Serpent Tongue|GrimHollowPG24} (level 5 version), using the spellcasting ability in Spellcasting.

spellcasting.name: Counterspell (1/Short Rest)
headerEntries: The blightworm warlock casts {@spell Counterspell|XPHB} (level 5 version) in response to that spell's trigger, using the spellcasting ability in Spellcasting.

trait.name: Blightworm Whispers
entries: The blightworm warlock has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws to avoid or end the {@condition Charmed|XPHB}, {@condition Deafened|XPHB}, {@condition Frightened|XPHB}, {@condition Stunned|XPHB}, and {@condition Unconscious|XPHB} conditions.

trait.name: Spell Siphon (1/Day)
entries: When the blightworm warlock successfully interrupts a spell using its Counterspell Reaction, it doesn't expend the Reaction and copies the spell. Until the warlock uses this trait again, it can cast the copied spell using its Spellcasting action, provided the spell is level 5 or lower.

action.name: Multiattack.
entries: The blightworm warlock makes two Eldritch Burst attacks.

action.name: Eldritch Burst
entries: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. or range 120 ft. {@h}19 ({@damage 3d10 + 3}) Force damage.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The blightworm warlock {@footnote casts|The spells are casted at 5th level} one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 16}, {@hit 8} to spell attacks):

spellcasting.name: Serpent Tongue (1/Short Rest)
headerEntries: The blightworm warlock casts {@spell Serpent Tongue|GrimHollowPG24} (level 5 version), using the spellcasting ability in Spellcasting.

spellcasting.name: Counterspell (2/Short Rest)
headerEntries: The blightworm warlock casts {@spell Counterspell|XPHB} (level 5 version) in response to that spell's trigger, using the spellcasting ability in Spellcasting.

trait.name: Blightworm Rebirth
entries: When the blightworm ascendant dies, a {@creature Blightworm|GrimHollowMG24} emerges in a space within 5 feet of the ascendant's corpse at the start of its next turn. (The blightworm is part of the ascendant's {@variantrule Challenge Rating|XPHB}.)

trait.name: Blightworm Whispers
entries: The blightworm ascendant has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws to avoid or end the {@condition Charmed|XPHB}, {@condition Deafened|XPHB}, {@condition Frightened|XPHB}, {@condition Stunned|XPHB}, and {@condition Unconscious|XPHB} conditions.

trait.name: Spell Siphon (Recharges after a Short or Long Rest)
entries: When the blightworm ascendant successfully interrupts a spell using its {@spell Counterspell|XPHB} Reaction, it doesn't expend the Reaction and copies the spell. Until the ascendant uses this trait again, it can cast the copied spell using its Spellcasting action, provided the spell is level 5 or lower.

action.name: Multiattack.
entries: The blightworm warlock makes two Eldritch Burst attacks.

action.name: Eldritch Burst
entries: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 8}, reach 5 ft. or range 120 ft. {@h}26 ({@damage 4d10 + 4}) Force damage, and the blightworm ascendant can push the target up to 10 feet away from the ascendant in a straight line.

monster.name: Blightworm
languages: understands the languages of its original host but can't speak

trait.name: Otherworldly Nimbleness
entries: The blightworm can move through the space of any creature larger than it.

trait.name: Slippery
entries: The blightworm has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on checks and saving throws to avoid or end the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition.

trait.name: Symbiotic Proficiency
entries: The blightworm has a {@variantrule Proficiency|XPHB|Proficiency Bonus} equal to that of its original host (usually +4).

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 5 ft. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d4 + 3}) Piercing damage, and the blightworm enters the target's space and attaches to it. While attached to the target, the blightworm moves with the target and can't Bite another target. A creature can take an action to detach the blightworm from the target with a successful {@dc 15} Strength ({@skill Athletics}) or Dexterity ({@skill Acrobatics}) check. The blightworm can detach as part of its movement and does so automatically if it becomes Incapacitated or dies.

If the blightworm hits a Humanoid it is attached to with a Bite attack, the target is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave con} {@dc 15}. {@actSaveFail} The blightworm burrows into the target. While embedded, the blightworm has {@variantrule Cover|XPHB|Total Cover} from effects that originate outside the target and it can't be detached. Subsequent Bite attacks against the target deal 8 ({@damage 2d4 + 3}) Piercing damage, or 16 Piercing damage on a {@variantrule Critical Hit|XPHB}. At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats the save, ending the effect on itself on a success. A {@spell Lesser Restoration|XPHB} or {@spell Protection from Evil and Good|XPHB} spell ends the effect early. If the effect ends, the blightworm is ejected into a space of its choice within 5 feet of the target.

If a Humanoid dies with the blightworm embedded in it, its soul departs at the start of the blightworm's next turn. The blightworm's original host then reincarnates using the target's body, remaking it into a blightworm ascendant with the same appearance as the original host. The ascendant has half of its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} and suffers two {@condition Exhaustion|XPHB} levels.

trait.name: Blood Pouches
entries: An adjacent blood bulb can take refuge in pouches in the blood brooder's sides, entering or exiting a pouch using 5 feet of movement. Bulbs in a pouch have {@variantrule Cover|XPHB|Three Quarters Cover}, share the blood brooder's space, and move with the blood brooder. The blood brooder can hold up to eight blood bulbs in its pouches.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The blood brooder makes three Spines attacks.

action.name: Spines
entries: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. or range 30/120 ft. {@h}10 ({@damage 2d6 + 3}) Piercing damage.

reaction.name: Blood Exchange
entries: The blood brooder loses any number of {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} and causes a blood bulb within 5 feet of it to regain an equal number of {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}. The blood brooder can't use Blood Exchange while it is {@status Bloodied|XPHB}.

bonus.name: Blood Exchange
entries: The blood bulb loses any number of {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} and causes a blood bulb or blood brooder within 5 feet of it to regain an equal number of {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}. The blood bulb can't use Blood Exchange while it is {@status Bloodied|XPHB}.

action.name: Attach
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft., one creature. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d4 + 3}) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is Medium or smaller, the blood bulb enters its space and attaches to it. If the blood bulb has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on the attack roll, it attaches by engulfing the target's head. Such a target has the {@condition Blinded|XPHB} condition and begins suffocating.

While attached, the blood bulb can only attack the target, but has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on attack rolls against it. On a hit, the target loses an extra 2 ({@dice 1d4}) {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} to blood loss.

The blood bulb moves with the target, and can detach from it by spending 5 feet of its movement. A creature within 5 feet of the target can forcibly detach the blood bulb by taking an action and succeeding on a {@dc 13} Strength ({@skill Athletics}) check.

trait.name: Amorphous
entries: The blood ooze can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch without expending extra movement to do so.

trait.name: Blood Scent
entries: The range of the blood ooze's {@sense Blindsight|XPHB} is doubled for living creatures missing any of their {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}.

trait.name: Infusion
entries: A creature engulfed by the blood ooze when it dies is instead infused with the blood ooze's essence, regaining 16 (3d10) {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}. It gains any excess healing as {@variantrule Temporary Hit Points|XPHB}, which last for 24 hours. If the target dies within 24 hours of this infusion, it dissolves into a blood ooze over the next hour. Magic that cures a disease or remove the curse prevents this change and removes any {@variantrule Temporary Hit Points|XPHB}.

trait.name: Spider Climb
entries: The blood ooze can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The blood ooze makes two Pseudopod attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Engulf.

action.name: Pseudopod
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}12 ({@damage 2d8 + 3}) Bludgeoning damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Necrotic damage. If the target is Medium or smaller, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 14}). While {@condition Grappled|XPHB}, the target has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition. The blood ooze can grapple two Medium or smaller creatures at a time.

action.name: Engulf
entries: {@actSave str} {@dc 14}, one creature {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by the blood ooze. {@actSaveFail} The grapple ends and the target is pulled into the blood ooze's body. The target has the {@condition Blinded|XPHB} and {@condition Restrained|XPHB} conditions, is suffocating, and has {@variantrule Cover|XPHB|Total Cover} from effects that originate outside the blood ooze. At the start of each of the blood ooze's turns, the target takes 18 ({@damage 4d8}) Acid damage. The blood ooze can have one creature engulfed at a time.

An engulfed creature can try to escape by taking an action to make its choice of a {@dc 14} Strength ({@skill Athletics}) or Dexterity ({@skill Acrobatics}) check. On a success, the creature escapes and uses 5 ft. of movement to enter a space of its choice within 5 ft. of the ooze.

The target can escape the blood ooze by taking an action and succeeding on a {@dc 14} Strength ({@skill Athletics}) or Dexterity ({@skill Acrobatics}) check. Escaping the ooze costs 5 feet of movement and ejects the target into a space of its choice within 5 feet of the blood ooze. If the ooze dies, the target no longer has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition and can escape without using an action or making a check.
If the target dies while engulfed, its body dissolves and the blood ooze expels anything it was wearing or carrying.

bonus.name: Predatory Lurch
entries: The blood ooze makes a Pseudopod attack against a creature missing any of its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}, or takes the {@action Dash|XPHB} action and moves toward such a creature.

monster.name: Blood Tracker
languages: understands one language but can't speak

trait.name: Blood Master
entries: The blood tracker can be bound to an Evil creature by eating the creature's blood daily for 13 days. While the master is within 100 feet of the blood tracker, the two can communicate telepathically. As an action while the blood tracker is within 300 feet, the master can use the tracker's senses until the start of the master's next turn. The master has the {@condition Blinded|XPHB} and {@condition Deafened|XPHB} conditions during this time.

trait.name: Blood Tracker
entries: The blood tracker has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on Wisdom ({@skill Survival}) checks to track creatures with blood. If such a creature is missing any of its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}, magic can't prevent the blood tracker from tracking it.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: blood tracker makes one Bite attack and uses Blood Bay.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 5 ft. {@h}13 ({@damage 2d8 + 4}) Piercing damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Necrotic damage. If the target is Medium or smaller, it has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Blood Bay
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 13}, one creature within 60 feet (with {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} if it is missing any {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}). {@actSaveFail} 13 ({@damage 3d8}) Thunder damage, or 19 ({@damage 3d12}) Thunder damage if the target is missing any {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}, and the target has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition until the end of the blood tracker's next turn. While {@condition Frightened|XPHB}, the target's {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} is 0 and can't increase.

trait.name: Resolute Followers
entries: Allies of the bloodbonded within 60 feet of it have {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on Charisma and Wisdom saving throws.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The bloodbonded makes one Mace attack and one Blood Boil attack.

action.name: Mace
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 3}, reach 5 ft. {@h}10 ({@damage 2d6 + 3}) Bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Blood Boil
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 14}, one creature the bloodbonded can see within 60 feet. {@actSaveFail} 9 ({@damage 2d8}) Fire damage. The bloodbonded must be able to speak to use Blood Boil.

bonus.name: Bloody Inspiration
entries: The bloodbonded causes an ally within 30 feet to enter a state of enraged bloodlust for 1 minute. The ally gains 5 {@variantrule Temporary Hit Points|XPHB}, {@variantrule Resistance|XPHB} to Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing damage, and {@variantrule Vulnerability|XPHB} to Psychic damage. The ally has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on attack rolls, but creatures have {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on attack rolls against the ally.

bonus.name: Rage Bomb (2/Day)
entries: The bloodbonded infuses an ally affected by Bloody Inspiration with fatal fury, causing it to foam at the mouth with blood. The ally explodes in a shower of superheated blood. Each creature within 10 feet of the exploding ally is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave dex} {@dc 14}. {@actSaveFail} 12 ({@damage 2d8 + 3}) Fire damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

reaction.name: Loyal Followers
entries: {@actTrigger} The bloodbonded is hit with an attack that targets only the bloodbonded. {@actResponse} An ally within 5 feet takes the damage instead.

spellcasting.name: Innate Spellcasting
headerEntries: The giant casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 11}):

trait.name: Bleeding Strikes
entries: A creature hit by the giant's Blood Spear attack is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave con} {@dc 15}. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Bleeding|GrimHollowPG24} condition {@homebrew |(see Grim Hollow Campaign Guide)}.

trait.name: Forest Camouflage
entries: The giant has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on Dexterity ({@skill Stealth}) checks made to hide in forested terrain.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The giant makes two attacks, using Blood Spear or Rock in any combination.

action.name: Blood Spear
entries: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 8}, reach 15 ft. or range 60/240 ft. {@h}21 ({@damage 3d10 + 5}) Piercing damage.

action.name: Rock
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 8}, range 60/240 ft. {@h}21 ({@damage 3d10 + 5}) Bludgeoning damage.

spellcasting.name: Innate Spellcasting
headerEntries: The giant casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 14}):

trait.name: Bleeding Strikes
entries: A creature hit by the giant's Blood Spear attack is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave con} {@dc 15}. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Bleeding|GrimHollowPG24} condition {@homebrew |(see Grim Hollow Campaign Guide)}.

trait.name: Forest Camouflage
entries: The giant has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on Dexterity ({@skill Stealth}) checks made to hide in forested terrain.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The giant makes two attacks, using Blood Spear or Rock in any combination. It can replace one of those attacks with Bloodvine.

action.name: Blood Spear
entries: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 8}, reach 15 ft. or range 60/240 ft. {@h}21 ({@damage 3d10 + 5}) Piercing damage.

action.name: Rock
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 8}, range 60/240 ft. {@h}21 ({@damage 3d10 + 5}) Bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Bloodvine
entries: {@atkr rs} {@hit 6}, range 60 ft. {@h}16 ({@damage 2d12 + 3}) Piercing damage, and the target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition. At the end of each of its turns, the target makes a {@dc 14} Constitution saving throw, ending the condition on a success. It automatically succeeds after 1 minute.

reaction.name: Bloodvine Drinker
entries: {@actTrigger} The giant damages a creature with a Bloodvine attack. {@actResponse} The giant regains 10 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}.

spellcasting.name: Innate Spellcasting
headerEntries: The giant casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 12}):

trait.name: Bleeding Strikes
entries: A creature hit by the giant's Blood Spear attack is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave con} {@dc 16}. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Bleeding|GrimHollowPG24} condition {@homebrew |(see Grim Hollow Campaign Guide)}.

trait.name: Forest Camouflage
entries: The giant has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on Dexterity ({@skill Stealth}) checks made to hide in forested terrain.

trait.name: Steadfast
entries: The giant can't have the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition while it can see an ally within 40 feet.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The giant makes two attacks, using Blood Spear or Rock in any combination.

action.name: Blood Spear
entries: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 10}, reach 15 ft. or range 60/240 ft. {@h}23 ({@damage 3d10 + 7}) Piercing damage.

action.name: Rock
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 10}, range 60/240 ft. {@h}23 ({@damage 3d10 + 7}) Bludgeoning damage.

monster.name: Bloody Avenue
languages: understands one language but can't speak

trait.name: Disguised Appearance
entries: While the bloody avenue remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from a normal roadway. Other creatures can occupy the avenue's space while it remains motionless. A creature who uses a {@action Search|XPHB} action to examine the roadway and succeeds on a {@dc 15} Intelligence ({@skill Arcana|XPHB} or {@skill Investigation|XPHB}) check spots the blood-tinged mortar with bits of bone and tiny runes on the cobbles, revealing its true nature.

trait.name: Mire
entries: The ground within 40 feet of the bloody avenue is {@variantrule Difficult Terrain|XPHB} for creatures of the avenue's choice. A creature that enters the area for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave str} {@dc 17}. {@actSaveFail} The creature has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 17}). {@actSaveFailBy 5} While {@condition Grappled|XPHB}, the creature has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition.

trait.name: Rise
entries: When the bloody avenue rolls {@variantrule Initiative|XPHB}, it rises up from the ground and takes a serpentine form, and each creature in its space is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave dex} {@dc 18}. {@actSaveFail} The creature is pushed into an unoccupied space within 5 feet of the bloody avenue and has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition. {@actSaveSuccess} The creature chooses the space it is pushed into and doesn't have the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The bloody avenue makes two Slam or Hurl Rubble attacks in any combination.

action.name: Slam
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 10}, reach 10 ft. {@h}28 ({@damage 4d10 + 6}) Bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Hurl Rubble
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 10}, range 60/120 ft. {@h}24 ({@damage 4d8 + 6}) Bludgeoning damage.

reaction.name: Alarum (Recharges after a Short or Long Rest)
entries: {@actTrigger} A condition set by the bloody avenue's creator, such as a specific creature entering the bloody avenue's space. {@actResponse} The bloody avenue alerts a creature within 1 mile, sending it a telepathic image of the trigger.

spellcasting.name: Innate Spellcasting
headerEntries: The toymaker casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 15}):

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The toymaker has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Naughty List
entries: The toymaker knows if a Humanoid it can see has committed a serious crime and whether it has been punished for it.

trait.name: Winter Footing
entries: The toymaker ignores {@variantrule Difficult Terrain|XPHB} imposed by ice or snow.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The toymaker makes three Claw attacks.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 8}, reach 5 ft. {@h}13 ({@damage 2d8 + 4}) Slashing damage, and if the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 16}).

action.name: Beard Spines {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 15}, each creature in a 30-foot {@variantrule Cone [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cone}. {@actSaveFail} 26 ({@damage 4d12}) Piercing damage. {@actSaveFail} Half damage.

action.name: Bag of Toys (Recharges after a Toy is Destroyed)
entries: The toymaker reaches into its bag and pulls out a random toy: {@creature Bloody Teddy|GrimHollowMG24}, {@creature Box-Bound Jack|GrimHollowMG24}, {@creature Dolly|GrimHollowMG24}, or {@creature Marie O'nett|GrimHollowMG24}. It tosses the toy into an unoccupied space within 10 feet. The toy is the toymaker's ally and obeys the toymaker's commands, taking its turn just after the toymaker. If issued no commands, the toy attacks a Hostile creature.

reaction.name: Bag
entries: {@actTrigger} A creature {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by the toymaker fails to escape. {@actResponse} Strength or {@actSave dex} {@dc 16}. {@actSaveFail} The creature is stuffed into the toymaker's bag. While in the bag, the target has the {@condition Blinded|XPHB} and {@condition Restrained|XPHB} conditions and has {@variantrule Cover|XPHB|Total Cover} from effects originating outside the bag.

When the toymaker uses Bag of Toys, creatures inside the bag are released, landing in unoccupied spaces within 5 feet of the toymaker with the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition. The creatures are also released if the bag takes 25+ damage in a single turn from a creature inside it. If the bag is torn, the toymaker can't use Bag of Toys until the bag is repaired. If the toymaker dies, creatures inside the bag no longer have the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition and can escape from it using 10 feet of movement, exiting with the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

trait.name: Immutable Form
entries: Box-Bound Jack can't shape-shift.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Box-Bound Jack make two Cymbal attacks.

action.name: Cymbal
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d4 + 3}) Bludgeoning damage plus 2 ({@damage 1d4}) Thunder damage.

action.name: Dissonant Clash {@recharge 5}
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 11}, each creature in a 15-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from Box-Bound Jack. {@actSaveFail} 9 ({@damage 2d8}) Thunder damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

bonus.name: Box Jumper
entries: Box-Bound Jack jumps without provoking {@action Opportunity Attack|XPHB|Opportunity Attacks}. Box-Bound Jack can {@variantrule Long Jump|XPHB} up to 20 feet or {@variantrule High Jump|XPHB} up to 10 feet, with or without a running start.

reaction.name: Bouncing Escape
entries: {@actTrigger} The {@condition Grappled|XPHB} or {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition ends on Box-Bound Jack, or Box-Bound Jack is released from the toymaker's bag. {@actResponse} Box-Bound Jack jumps up to 20 feet and makes one Cymbal attack.

trait.name: Immutable Form
entries: Dolly can't shape-shift.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Dolly uses Creepy Voice and makes one Touch attack.

action.name: Touch
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h}5 ({@damage 2d4}) Psychic damage. {@actSave con} {@dc 11}. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition until the end of Dolly's next turn.

action.name: Creepy Voice
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 11}, each creature in a 15-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from Dolly that can hear it. {@actSaveFail} 5 ({@damage 2d4}) Psychic damage, and the target has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition until the end of Dolly's next turn. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to becoming {@condition Frightened|XPHB} by Dolly's Creepy Voice for 1 hour, but can still take damage.

reaction.name: Crying Escape
entries: {@actTrigger} The {@condition Grappled|XPHB} or {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition ends on Dolly, or Dolly is released from the toymaker's bag. {@actResponse} Dolly crawls up to 15 feet, stands up, and uses Creepy Voice.

trait.name: Immutable Form
entries: Bloody Teddy can't shape-shift.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Bloody Teddy makes one Bite attack and one Slam attack.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 2d4 + 2}) Piercing damage.

action.name: Slam
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 2d4 + 2}) Bludgeoning damage. If Bloody Teddy moved 20+ feet straight toward it immediately before the hit, the target takes an extra 5 ({@damage 2d4}) Bludgeoning damage and if the target is Medium or smaller, it has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

reaction.name: Released Rush
entries: {@actTrigger} The {@condition Grappled|XPHB} or {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition ends on Bloody Teddy, or Bloody Teddy is released from the toymaker's bag. {@actResponse} Bloody Teddy moves up to 20 feet and makes a Slam attack.

trait.name: Immutable Form
entries: Marie O'Nett can't shape-shift.

trait.name: On Strings
entries: Marie O'Nett can {@variantrule High Jump|XPHB} up to 30 feet. It takes no falling damage when descending from this jump.

trait.name: Spellbinding Movement
entries: When Marie O'Nett moves, it can choose one creature within 30 feet that can see it, subjecting the creature to the following effect. {@actSave wis} {@dc 11}. {@actSaveFail} 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Psychic damage, and the target has the {@condition Charmed|XPHB} condition until the end of Marie O'Nett's next turn or until it takes damage. While {@condition Charmed|XPHB}, the target's {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} is halved.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Marie O'Nett makes two Whip attacks.

action.name: Whip
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 10 ft. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d4 + 3}) Slashing damage.

reaction.name: Hoisted Escape
entries: {@actTrigger} The {@condition Grappled|XPHB} or {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition ends on Marie O'Nett, or Marie O'Nett is released from the toymaker's bag. {@actResponse} Marie O'Nett {@variantrule High Jump|XPHB}s up to 30 feet and uses Spellbinding Movement.

trait.name: Amphibious
entries: The bog crawler can breathe air and water.

trait.name: Slimy Movement
entries: The bog crawler ignores {@variantrule Difficult Terrain|XPHB}, and magical effects can't reduce its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} or cause it to have the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition. It can spend 5 feet of movement to escape from nonmagical restraints or the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The bog crawler makes two Tentacle attacks, or one Tentacle attack and one Bite attack or Swallow action.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 13}, reach 5 ft. {@h}34 ({@damage 4d12 + 8}) Piercing damage, and the target has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 21}). While {@condition Grappled|XPHB}, the target has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition and the bog crawler can't Bite another target.

action.name: Tentacle
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 13}, reach 20 ft. {@h}26 ({@damage 4d8 + 8}) Bludgeoning damage, and the target has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 21}). While {@condition Grappled|XPHB}, the target has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition. The bog crawler has six tentacles, each of which can grapple one target.

action.name: Swallow
entries: The bog crawler makes one Bite attack against a Huge or smaller creature it has {@condition Grappled|XPHB} with its Bite. {@h}The target takes the Bite attack's damage, no longer has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition, and is swallowed. While swallowed, the target has the {@condition Blinded|XPHB} and {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition and {@variantrule Cover|XPHB|Total Cover} from effects that originate outside the bog crawler. It takes 36 ({@damage 8d8}) Acid damage at the start of each of the bog crawler's turns.

If the bog crawler takes 30 damage or more on a single turn from a creature inside it, the bog crawler must succeed on a {@dc 21} Constitution saving throw at the end of that turn or regurgitate all swallowed creatures, which land in spaces within 10 feet of the bog crawler and have the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition. If the bog crawler dies, a swallowed creature no longer has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition and can escape the corpse using 15 feet of movement, exiting with the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

trait.name: Dryad Protection
entries: The bolejack has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects that don't come from an allied dryad.

trait.name: Dryad's Stride
entries: Moving through nonmagical {@variantrule Difficult Terrain|XPHB}, as well as magical {@variantrule Difficult Terrain|XPHB} created by an allied dryad, costs the bolejack no extra movement.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The bolejack makes one Battleaxe attack and one Handaxe attack.

action.name: Battleaxe
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d8 + 2}) Force damage.

action.name: Handaxe
entries: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d6 + 2}) Force damage.

action.name: Axe Sweep {@recharge 5}
entries: The bolejack makes a Battleaxe attack against two adjacent creatures within its reach, using the same attack roll for both targets. A Medium or smaller creature hit by either attack has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

trait.name: Speak with Beasts
entries: The bone trader can communicate with Beasts as if they shared a language.

action.name: Bone Club
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h}9 ({@damage 2d6 + 2}) Bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Skelesuck
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h}4 ({@damage 1d4 + 2}) Piercing damage. {@actSave con} {@dc 10}. {@actSaveFail} One of the target's bones is sucked out. The target's {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} maximum is reduced by the amount of piercing damage it took until magical healing is applied.

action.name: Fey Charm
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 14}, one Beast, Fey, or Humanoid the bone trader can see within 30 feet. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Charmed|XPHB} condition, regarding the bone trader as a trusted friend to be heeded and protected. Although the target isn't under the bone trader's control, it takes the bone trader's requests or actions in the most favorable way. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to the bone trader's Fey Charm for 24 hours.

Each time the bone trader or its allies do anything harmful to the target, it repeats its save, ending the effect on itself and becoming immune on a success. Otherwise, the effect lasts 24 hours or until the bone trader dies, is on a different plane of existence from the target, or ends the effect as a {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB}.

bonus.name: Bone Armor (1/Day)
entries: While in its lair, the bone trader can summon a temporary suit of bone armor that lasts for 10 minutes or until dismissed using this {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB}. While wearing its bone armor, the bone trader has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on Wisdom saving and Charisma ({@skill Intimidation|XPHB}) checks.

trait.name: Fey Ancestry
entries: The braerog has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws made to avoid or end the {@condition Charmed|XPHB} condition, and magic can't put it to sleep.

action.name: Beak
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d6 + 3}) Piercing damage.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d4 + 3}) Slashing damage.

action.name: Briar Patch {@recharge}
entries: Thorny vines sprout from the ground ina 20-foot Square starting from a point within 5 feet of the braerog. The patch is {@variantrule Difficult Terrain|XPHB} for 1 minute, until the braerog uses this action again, until the braerog dismisses the patch as a {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB}, or until the braerog has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition or dies. The braerog chooses which creatures are affected by the patch when it appears.

{@actSave str} {@dc 11}, a creature that enters the area or starts its turn there. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 11}). While {@condition Grappled|XPHB}, the target has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition.

bonus.name: Tree Stride (1/Round)
entries: If within 5 feet of a Medium or larger tree, the braerog teleports to an unoccupied space within 5 feet of a second Medium or larger tree that is within 60 feet of the previous tree.

trait.name: Reckless Attack
entries: At the start of its turn, the bugbear can gain {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on all melee weapon attack rolls during that turn, but attack rolls against it have {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} until the start of its next turn.

trait.name: Tormach's Rage
entries: The bugbear has a disease called {@disease Tormach's Rage|GrimHollowMG24} that changes its alignment to Chaotic Evil, gives it the Reckless Attack trait, and grants it an extra 2 ({@damage 1d4}) damage on Strengthbased attacks (included in the attack).

A bugbear that touches the rage-infected bugbear is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave con} {@dc 14}. {@actSaveFail} The target contracts {@disease Tormach's Rage|GrimHollowMG24}. Only powerful magic like a {@spell Greater Restoration|XPHB} spell or a special herbal concoction (see Salvage) can cure this disease.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}8 ({@damage 2d4 + 3}) Piercing damage. If the target is a bugbear, it is subjected to {@disease Tormach's Rage|GrimHollowMG24}.

action.name: Greataxe
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}18 ({@damage 2d12 + 1d4 + 3}) Slashing damage.

bonus.name: Rampage
entries: After reducing a creature to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} with a melee attack, the bugbear moves up to half its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} and makes a Bite attack.

trait.name: Lunge
entries: When the bugbear makes an attack with a melee weapon, its reach is increased by 5 feet (included in the attack).

trait.name: Reckless Attack
entries: At the start of its turn, the bugbear can gain {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on all melee weapon attack rolls during that turn, but attack rolls against it have {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} until the start of its next turn.

trait.name: Tormach's Rage
entries: The bugbear has a disease called {@disease Tormach's Rage|GrimHollowMG24} that changes its alignment to Chaotic Evil, gives it the Reckless Attack trait, and grants it an extra 2 ({@damage 1d4}) damage on Strengthbased attacks (included in the attack).

A bugbear that touches the rage-infected bugbear is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave con} {@dc 14}. {@actSaveFail} The target contracts {@disease Tormach's Rage|GrimHollowMG24}. Only powerful magic like a {@spell Greater Restoration|XPHB} spell or a special herbal concoction (see Salvage) can cure this disease.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The bugbear makes three attacks, two Glaive and one Haft. It can replace a Glaive attack with Bite.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 5 ft. {@h}9 ({@damage 2d4 + 4}) damage. If the target is a bugbear, it is subjected to {@disease Tormach's Rage|GrimHollowMG24}.

action.name: Glaive
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 15 ft. {@h}17 ({@damage 2d10 + 1d4 + 4}) Slashing damage.

action.name: Haft
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 10 ft. {@h}11 ({@damage 2d6 + 4}) Bludgeoning damage.

bonus.name: Rampage
entries: After reducing a creature to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} with a melee attack, the bugbear moves up to half its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} and makes a Bite attack.

monster.name: Cadeer
languages: understands four languages but can't speak

spellcasting.name: Innate Spellcasting
headerEntries: The cadeer casts {@spell Detect Magic|XPHB} or {@spell Identify|XPHB}, requiring no Material components and using Intelligence as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 13}). The cadeer can also cast any spell sorted in its antlers at the same level it was previously cast.

trait.name: Magic Sense
entries: Given 1 minute of {@status Concentration|XPHB}, the cadeer can sense magic within 3 miles outdoors and 300 feet underground. Using this sense, the cadeer senses only significant sources of magic, such as powerful magical beings or items, the of other planes, and strong ongoing spells. The cadeer has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on Intelligence ({@skill Investigation}) and Wisdom ({@skill Perception}) checks to discern magic.

action.name: Ram
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d4 + 3}) Bludgeoning damage. If the cadeer has a spell stored in its antlers, it deals an extra 2 ({@damage 1d4}) Force damage.

reaction.name: Spell Absorption
entries: {@actTrigger} The cadeer is the target of (or is included in the area of) a spell of level 2 or lower. {@actResponse} The cadeer can choose to absorb the spell with its antlers. The spell has no effect and the cadeer stores the spell in its antlers. When the cadeer stores a spell, any spell previously stored in the antlers dissipates harmlessly.

spellcasting.name: Innate Spellcasting
headerEntries: The daemon's casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 15}, {@hit 7} to spell attacks):

spellcasting.name: Protective Magic (2/Day)
headerEntries: The daemon casts {@spell Counterspell|XPHB} or {@spell Shield|XPHB} in response to the spell's trigger, using the same spellcasting ability in Innate Spellcasting.

trait.name: Candle Dependence
entries: The daemon remains on the Material Plane only while the candle that summoned it burns.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The daemon has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Nether Step
entries: As its movement for its turn, the candlelight daemon can teleport to an unoccupied space within 30 feet of it, provided the space it's teleporting to and from are both in {@variantrule Dim Light|XPHB} or {@variantrule Darkness|XPHB}. The daemon doesn't need to see the destination.

trait.name: Slayer's {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB}
entries: The daemon has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on attack rolls against any creature that hasn't had a turn in combat.

trait.name: Slayer's Attack (1/Turn)
entries: The daemon deals an extra 21 ({@damage 6d6}) damage when it hits a target with an attack and has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on the attack roll. With the {@spell Suffocate|GrimHollowPG24} spell, the daemon deals this extra damage as Bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The daemon makes two Claw attacks and one Gore attack. It can use Hurl Fire in place of any of these attacks.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 9}, reach 5 ft. {@h}12 ({@damage 2d6 + 5}) Slashing damage plus 4 ({@damage 1d8}) Fire damage.

action.name: Gore
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 9}, reach 5 ft. {@h}14 ({@damage 2d8 + 5}) Slashing damage plus 4 ({@damage 1d8}) Fire damage.

action.name: Hurl Fire
entries: {@atkr rs} {@hit 9}, range 120 ft. {@h}21 ({@damage 4d8 + 3}) Fire damage.

bonus.name: Shadow Stealth
entries: While in {@variantrule Dim Light|XPHB} or {@variantrule Darkness|XPHB}, the daemon can take the {@action Hide|XPHB} action as a {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB}.

trait.name: Implosion
entries: The caprathorn implodes and leaves behind a {@item Sphere of Annihilation|XDMG} when it dies. {@actSave str} {@dc 21}, each creature in a 10-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the caprathorn when it dies. {@actSaveFail} The target is pulled 10 feet toward the sphere.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (4/Day)
entries: If the caprathorn fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The caprathorn has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Thornlamms
entries: A caprathorn typically has three inanimate {@creature Thornlamm|GrimHollowMG24|Thornlamms} attached to its horns with vines, and can have up to six thornlamms at a time. Attached thornlamms don't take damage separately, but whenever the caprathorn takes 50 or more damage in a single turn, an attached thornlamm dies.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The caprathorn makes three attacks using Gore, Stomp, or Thorn in any combination.

action.name: Gore
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 14}, reach 10 ft. {@h}25 ({@damage 4d8 + 7}) Force damage. If the caprathorn moved 20+ feet straight toward the target immediately before the hit, the target takes an extra 18 ({@damage 4d8}) Force damage and, if it is Large or smaller, is pushed 10 feet away and has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Stomp
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 14}, reach 10 ft. {@h}25 ({@damage 4d8 + 7}) Force damage.

action.name: Thorns
entries: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 14}, reach 10 ft. or range 30/120 ft. {@h}21 ({@damage 4d6 + 7}) Force damage. Being within 5 feet of a {@variantrule Hostile [Attitude]|XPHB|Hostile} creature doesn't impose {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on the caprathorn's Thorn attack.

legendary.name: Attack
entries: The caprathorn makes a Stomp or Gore attack.

legendary.name: Thornlamm Cultivation
entries: The caprathorn uses Pluck Thornlamm. If it hasn't taken damage from a silvered weapon this round, it can instead grow a new {@creature Thornlamm|GrimHollowMG24}. The caprathorn can't use this action again until the start of its next turn.

legendary.name: Entomb
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 18}, a creature with 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} that the caprathorn can see within 30 feet. {@actSaveFail} The target is entombed deep within the earth in a sphere of magical force, as if by the Burial option of the {@spell Imprisonment|XPHB} spell. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to Entomb for 24 hours. {@actSaveSuccessOrFail} The caprathorn can't use this action again until the start of its next turn.

The caprathorn can Entomb only one target a time. If the target regains any {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} or the caprathorn dies, the effect ends, returning the target to the last space it occupied. If the target dies while entombed, the caprathorn's Annihilation Field recharges.

legendary.name: Annihilation Field (Recharges after a Long Rest)
entries: {@actSave con} {@dc 18}, each creature in a 30-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the caprathorn. {@actSaveFail} 38 ({@damage 7d10}) Force damage. The {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} destroys Small and Tiny nonmagical objects and damages Medium or larger ones, except those being worn or carried. Creations of magical force, such as the {@spell Wall of Force|XPHB} spell, are destroyed by the {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation}. A creature or object reduced to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} by the {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} is disintegrated, turning to a fine ash. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

monster.name: Thornlamm
monster.cr: — with a caprathorn (1/4 [50 XP] by itself)

action.name: Hooves
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 2d4 + 2}) Bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Needles
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 4}, range 30/60 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 2d4 + 2}) Piercing damage.

trait.name: Hunting Cry
entries: The dread llama's cry alerts all other dread llamas within 300 feet. An alerted llama can {@action Dash|XPHB} as a {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB} on each of its turns for 1 minute.

action.name: Kick
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 2d4 + 2}) Bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Spit
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 2}, range 10/30 ft. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d6 + 2}) Acid damage.

action.name: Gore
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}11 ({@damage 2d6 + 4}) Piercing damage.

action.name: Hooves
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d8 + 4}) Piercing damage.

bonus.name: Charge
entries: If the carnivorous cow moves 20+ feet straight toward a creature, it can make a Hooves attack against it as a {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB}.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The edacious equine uses Three-Eyed Gaze and makes one Hooves attack.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d6 + 4}) Piercing damage.

action.name: Hooves
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}13 ({@damage 2d8 + 4}) Bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Three-Eyed Gaze
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 12}, one creature within 30 feet that can see the edacious equine and be seen by it. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Charmed|XPHB} condition until the end of the equine's next turn. While {@condition Charmed|XPHB}, the creature has the {@condition Restrained|XPHB} condition. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to any equine's Three-Eyed Gaze for 24 hours.

bonus.name: Charmed Bite
entries: If the edacious equine hits a {@condition Charmed|XPHB} target with a Hooves attack, it can make a Bite attack against the target as a {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB}.

trait.name: Quill Regrowth
entries: The esurient elephant has eighteen quills. Used quills regrow when the elephant finishes a {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}.

action.name: Gore
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 9}, reach 5 ft. {@h}22 ({@damage 3d10 + 6}) Piercing damage. If the elephant moved 20+ feet straight toward the target immediately before the hit and the target is Large or smaller, the target has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Stomp
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 9}, reach 5 ft. {@h}25 ({@damage 3d12 + 6}) Bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Quills
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 9}, range 30/60 ft., up to two targets. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d4 + 6}) Piercing damage plus 14 ({@damage 4d6}) Poison damage.

bonus.name: Trample
entries: After causing a target to have the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition with its Gore attack, the elephant can make a Stomp attack against the target as a {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB}.

trait.name: Tears of the Hungerer
entries: A Beast or Humanoid that takes damage from the hungerer elk is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave con} {@dc 11}. {@actSaveFail} The target contracts a magical disease called {@disease Tears of the Hungerer|GrimHollowPG24}. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to the disease for 24 hours.

An infected target decreases its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} maximum by 2 ({@damage 1d4}) every 24. If this effect reduces its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} maximum to 0, the target dies and becomes a {@creature Zombie|XMM} with this trait. {@disease Tears of the Hungerer|GrimHollowPG24} can only be cured by magic.

action.name: Ram
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}8 ({@damage 2d4 + 3}) Piercing damage. If the hungerer elk moved 20+ feet straight toward the target immediately before the hit and the target is Large or smaller, the target has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Hooves
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}10 ({@damage 2d6 + 3}) Bludgeoning damage.

bonus.name: Aggressive
entries: The hungerer elk moves up to its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} toward a {@variantrule Hostile [Attitude]|XPHB|Hostile} creature it can see.

bonus.name: Trample
entries: The hungerer elk can make a Stomp attack against a {@condition Prone|XPHB} target as a {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB}.

trait.name: Blood Frenzy
entries: The hungerer snake has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on melee attack rolls against a creature missing any of its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}.

trait.name: Tears of the Hungerer
entries: A Beast or Humanoid that takes damage from the hungerer elk is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave con} {@dc 11}. {@actSaveFail} The target contracts a magical disease called {@disease Tears of the Hungerer|GrimHollowPG24}. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to the disease for 24 hours.

An infected target decreases its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} maximum by 2 ({@damage 1d4}) every 24 hours. If this effect reduces its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} maximum to 0, the target dies and becomes a {@creature Zombie|XMM} with this trait. {@disease Tears of the Hungerer|GrimHollowPG24} can only be cured by magic.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d4 + 3}) Piercing damage. {@actSave con} {@dc 13}, the target. {@actSaveFail} 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Poison damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

action.name: Tail Blade
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}) Slashing damage.

bonus.name: Aggressive
entries: The hungerer snake moves up to its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} toward a {@variantrule Hostile [Attitude]|XPHB|Hostile} creature it can see.

trait.name: Pack Tactics
entries: The hungerer wolf has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on attack rolls against a creature if at least one of the wolf's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

trait.name: Tears of the Hungerer
entries: A Beast or Humanoid that takes damage from the hungerer elk is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave con} {@dc 11}. {@actSaveFail} The target contracts a magical disease called {@disease Tears of the Hungerer|GrimHollowPG24}. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to the disease for 24 hours.

An infected target decreases its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} maximum by 2 ({@damage 1d4}) every 24 hours. If this effect reduces its {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} maximum to 0, the target dies and becomes a {@creature Zombie|XMM} with this trait. {@disease Tears of the Hungerer|GrimHollowPG24} can only be cured by magic.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 3}, reach 5 ft. {@h}9 ({@damage 2d6 + 2}) Piercing damage, and if the target is Medium or smaller, it has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

bonus.name: Aggressive
entries: The hungerer wolf moves up to its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} toward a {@variantrule Hostile [Attitude]|XPHB|Hostile} creature it can see.

trait.name: Chameleon
entries: The carvaloth has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on Dexterity ({@skill Stealth}) checks made to {@action Hide|XPHB}.

trait.name: Pack Tactics
entries: The carvaloth has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the carvaloth's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The carvaloth makes one Bite attack and one Claw attack.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h}4 ({@damage 1d4 + 2}) Piercing damage plus 2 ({@damage 1d4}) Acid damage.

action.name: Claws
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h}4 ({@damage 1d4 + 2}) Slashing damage.

monster.name: Catacomb Haunt
languages: the languages it knew in life

trait.name: Elemental Weakness
entries: The catacomb haunt has {@variantrule Vulnerability|XPHB} to one of the following damage types: Acid, Cold, Fire, Lightning, or Thunder. A creature can take the {@action Study|XPHB} action to study the haunt, discovering the {@variantrule Vulnerability|XPHB} with a successful {@dc 15} Intelligence ({@skill Investigation}) or Wisdom ({@skill Perception}) check.

If the haunt takes damage it has a {@variantrule Vulnerability|XPHB} to, it loses its {@variantrule Resistance|XPHB|Resistences}, {@variantrule Immunity|XPHB|Immunities} (except to the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition), Incorporeal Movement trait, and {@variantrule Fly Speed|XPHB}. At the end of each of its turns, the haunt makes a {@dc 13} Constitution saving throw, regaining its lost abilities on a success. It automatically succeeds after 1 minute.

trait.name: Incorporeal Movement
entries: The catacomb haunt can move through other creatures and objects as if they were {@variantrule Difficult Terrain|XPHB}. It takes 5 ({@damage 1d10}) Force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

trait.name: Sneak Attack (1/Turn)
entries: The catacomb haunt deals an extra 17 ({@damage 5d6}) damage when it hits a target with an attack and has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on the attack roll, or when the target is within 5 feet of an ally of the haunt that doesn't have the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition and the haunt doesn't have {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on the attack roll.

action.name: Touch
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}13 ({@damage 3d6 + 3}) Necrotic damage.

bonus.name: Escape
entries: The catacomb haunt takes the Disengage action.

trait.name: Hallucinatory Hold
entries: The cauchemange needs only to touch a creature to deal damage, grappling a creature by force of presence rather than physical strength. The cauchemange has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on attack rolls against a creature it has {@condition Grappled|XPHB}. A creature {@condition Grappled|XPHB} by the cauchemange can also use Wisdom ({@skill Insight}) to escape.

trait.name: Happiness Susceptibility
entries: A creature within 30 feet of the cauchemange can take an action to inspire happiness or hope and make a {@dc 13} Charisma ({@skill Performance}) check. {@actSaveSuccess} The cauchemange has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on attack rolls until the end of the creature's next turn.

trait.name: Implant Larva
entries: A Humanoid killed by the cauchemange is implanted. A {@creature Cauchemange Larva|GrimHollowMG24} emerges from the Humanoid's corpse 8 hours later.

trait.name: Nightmare Aura
entries: A creature that starts its turn within 30 feet of the cauchemange is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave wis} {@dc 13}. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition until the start of its next turn. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to the Nightmare Aura of all cauchemanges for 1 hour.

trait.name: Psychic Teleport {@recharge 5}
entries: As its movement for its turn, the cauchemange can teleport to an unoccupied space within 30 feet, provided the space is within 10 feet of a creature with an Intelligence score of 3 or higher. The cauchemange doesn't need to see the destination.

action.name: Touch
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}9 ({@damage 1d12 + 3}) Psychic damage, and the target has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 13}). The target believes the damage to be of a type appropriate to the cauchemange's form.

action.name: Drain
entries: The cauchemange makes a Touch attack against a creature it has {@condition Grappled|XPHB}. Hit—{@actSave cha} {@dc 13}. {@actSaveFail} The target's {@variantrule Hit Points|Hit Point} maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the damage taken. This reduction lasts until the target finishes a {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}. If this effect reduces the target's {@variantrule Hit Points|Hit Point} maximum to 0, it dies.

action.name: Glamor
entries: {@actSave wis} {@dc 13}, one Humanoid within 30 feet that can see the cauchemange. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Charmed|XPHB} condition and sees the cauchemange as something or someone desirable. The target regards the cauchemange as a trusted friend to be heeded and protected. The target isn't under the cauchemange's control, but it takes the cauchemange's requests and actions in the most favorable light, it is a willing target for the cauchemange's Touch attack, and it becomes a willing host for a cauchemange larva, which it also sees as something desirable.

Each time the cauchemange or its allies do something harmful to it, the target repeats the save, ending the effect on itself on a success. It automatically succeeds after 24 hours or if the cauchemange is destroyed, is on a different plane of existence, or ends the effect early as a {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB}.

trait.name: Happiness Susceptibility
entries: A creature within 30 feet of the cauchemange can take an action to inspire happiness or hope and make a {@dc 14} Charisma ({@skill Performance}) check. {@actSaveSuccess} The cauchemange has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on attack rolls until the end of the creature's next turn.

trait.name: Implant Larva
entries: A Humanoid killed by the cauchemange is implanted. A {@creature Cauchemange Larva|GrimHollowMG24} emerges from the Humanoid's corpse 8 hours later.

trait.name: Incorporeal Movement
entries: The cauchemange can move through other creatures and objects as if they were {@variantrule Difficult Terrain|XPHB}. It takes 5 ({@damage 1d10}) Force damage if it ends its turn in side an object.

trait.name: Nightmare Aura
entries: A creature that starts its turn within 30 feet of the cauchemange is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave wis} {@dc 14}. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition until the start of its next turn. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to the Nightmare Aura of all cauchemanges for 1 hour.

trait.name: Psychic Teleport {@recharge 4}
entries: As its movement for its turn, the cauchemange can teleport to an unoccupied space within 40 feet, provided the space is within 10 feet of a creature with an Intelligence score of 3 or higher. The cauchemange doesn't need to see the destination.

trait.name: Thought Location
entries: The cauchemange can detect creatures within 60 feet that have an Intelligence score of 2 or higher, provided they aren't Constructs. Effects that prevent Divination from working on a creature thwart this sense. This sense penetrates barriers, but 2 feet of rock, 2 inches of any metal other than lead, or a thin sheet of lead blocks it. The cauchemange can't be surprised by a creature it can sense.

action.name: Touch
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}16 ({@damage 3d8 + 3}) Psychic damage, or 21 (4d8 + 3) against a {@condition Frightened|XPHB} creature. {@actSave cha} {@dc 14}. {@actSaveFail} The target's {@variantrule Hit Points|Hit Point} maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the damage taken. This reduction lasts until the target finishes a {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}. If this effect reduces the target's {@variantrule Hit Points|Hit Point} maximum to 0, it dies.

action.name: Killing Nightmare (Recharges after a Short or Long Rest)
entries: {@actSave cha} {@dc 14}, each {@condition Frightened|XPHB} creature in a 30-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation}. {@actSaveFail} 25 ({@damage 4d10 + 3}) Psychic damage. {@actSaveFailBy 5} The creature is reduced to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The cauchemange larva has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft {@h}5 ({@damage 1d4 + 3}) Piercing damage. {@variantrule Critical Hit|XPHB}: If the target isn't infected by a cauchemange larva, the larva burrows into it. Once inside, the larva is a disease. Each time an infected target finishes a {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}, it is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave wis} {@dc 10}. {@actSaveFail} The target regains no {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} from the rest. After 7 days, the larva erupts from the target as a {@creature Corporeal Cauchemange|GrimHollowMG24} or an {@creature Incorporeal Cauchemange|GrimHollowMG24}, dealing 20 ({@damage 4d8 + 2}) Slashing damage to the target.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The celestial celebrant casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 13}, {@hit 5} to spell attacks):

spellcasting.name: Celestial Magic (3/Day)
headerEntries: The celestial celebrant casts {@spell Healing Word|XPHB} (level 2 version) or {@spell Spiritual Weapon|XPHB}, using the spellcasting ability in Spellcasting.

action.name: Mace
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d6 + 2}) Bludgeoning damage plus 13 ({@damage 3d8}) Radiant damage.

reaction.name: Succor (Recharges after a Short or Long Rest)
entries: {@actTrigger} The celestial celebrant or a creature it can see within 60 feet takes damage. {@actResponse} The celebrant casts {@spell Cure Wounds|XPHB} on the triggering creature.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The celestial campaigner casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 14}, {@hit 6} to spell attacks):

spellcasting.name: Celestial Magic (3/Day)
headerEntries: The celestial celebrant casts {@spell Shield of Faith|XPHB} or {@spell Spiritual Weapon|XPHB}, using the spellcasting ability in Spellcasting.

trait.name: War Blessing
entries: A weapon deals two extra dice of its damage when the celestial campaigner hits with it (included in the attack).

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The celestial campaigner makes two Longsword attacks.

action.name: Longsword
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}16 ({@damage 3d8 + 3}) Slashing damage, or 19 ({@damage 3d10 + 3}) Slashing damage if wielded with two hands.

reaction.name: Protection
entries: {@actTrigger} A creature the celestial campaigner can see within 5 feet makes an attack against a creature other than the campaigner. {@actResponse} The campaigner imposes {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on the triggering attack.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The Tormach zealot casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 12}):

action.name: Whip
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 10 ft. {@h}4 ({@damage 1d4 + 2}) Slashing damage, and if the target is Medium or smaller, it is pushed 5 feet or has the Prone condition (zealot's choice).

bonus.name: Blood-Soaked Inspiration
entries: After dealing damage, the Tormach zealot chooses one creature within 60 feet that can see and hear it. The target can roll {@dice 1d6} and add the result to one {@variantrule D20 Test|XPHB} it makes before the end of its next turn.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The Tormach cultist uses Frightening Scream and makes two Handaxe attacks.

action.name: Handaxe
entries: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft. {@h}4 ({@damage 1d6 + 1}) Slashing damage.

action.name: Frightening Scream
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 10}, each creature in a 20-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the cultist that can hear it. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition until the end of the cultist's next turn. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to the Frightening Scream of all Tormach cultists for 24 hours.

bonus.name: Rampage
entries: When the Tormach cultist reduces a creature to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} with a melee attack, it can move up to half its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} and make a melee attack.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The champion of Tormach casts one of the following spells, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save {@dc 12}):

spellcasting.name: Hunter's Mark (2/Day)
headerEntries: The champion of Tormach casts {@spell Hunter's Mark|XPHB}, using the same spellcasting ability in Spellcasting.

spellcasting.name: Misty Step (1/Day)
headerEntries: The champion of Tormach casts {@spell Misty Step|XPHB}, using the same spellcasting ability in Spellcasting.

trait.name: Protection Aura
entries: The champion of Tormach emits a 10-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} of protection. While the champion doesn't have the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition, each creature of the champion's choice in the {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} gains a +2 bonus to saving throws. A creature can benefit from only one such aura at a time.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The champion of Tormach makes two Battleaxe attacks.

action.name: Battleaxe
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}12 ({@damage 2d8 + 3}) Slashing damage.

reaction.name: Smite
entries: When the champion of Tormach hits a creature with a melee weapon attack, it can expend a spell from its Spellcasting. The spell has no effect, and the attack deals an extra 9 ({@damage 2d8}) Necrotic or Radiant damage.

monster.name: Chiropteran Behemoth
languages: understands one language but can't speak

trait.name: Flyby
entries: The behemoth doesn't provoke {@action Opportunity Attack|XPHB|Opportunity Attacks} while it flies out of an enemy's reach.

trait.name: Regeneration
entries: The behemoth gains 20 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} at the start of its turn. If the behemoth is exposed to an Undoing Elixir, this trait doesn't function at the start of its next turn. The behemoth dies only if it starts its turn with 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} and doesn't regenerate.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (4/Day)
entries: If the chiropteran behemoth fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The behemoth has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Potent Weapons
entries: The behemoth's attacks ignore {@variantrule Resistance|XPHB|Resistances}.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The behemoth makes a Bite attack and two Claw attacks.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 12}, reach 5 ft. {@h}33 ({@damage 6d8 + 6}) Force damage. If the behemoth has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on the attack roll, it deals an extra 17 ({@damage 5d6}) Necrotic damage.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 12}, reach 10 ft. {@h}20 ({@damage 4d6 + 6}) Force damage. {@variantrule Critical Hit|XPHB}: 48 ({@damage 12d6 + 6}) Force damage, and if the target dies, its head or another vital body part is severed or destroyed. If the behemoth moved at least 20 feet straight toward the target immediately before the hit, the target has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Shriek {@recharge}
entries: {@actSave int} {@dc 19}, each creature in a 60-foot {@variantrule Cone [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cone}. {@actSaveFail} 45 ({@damage 7d12}) Psychic damage, and the target has the {@condition Paralyzed|XPHB} condition. At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats the save, ending the effect on itself on a success. It automatically succeeds after 1 minute.

bonus.name: Darkness Aura
entries: The behemoth creates magical darkness in a 40-foot radius {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} until the start of its next turn. A creature with {@sense Darkvision|XPHB} can't see through this darkness and nonmagical light can't illuminate it. A light-producing spell of level 5 or lower is dispelled if its area overlaps the darkness's area.

legendary.name: Detect
entries: The chiropteran behemoth makes a Wisdom ({@skill Perception}) check.

legendary.name: Claw
entries: The behemoth makes a Claw attack.

legendary.name: Swoop
entries: The behemoth moves up to half its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} and makes a Claw attack. The behemoth can't use this action again until the start of its next turn.

legendary.name: Wing Buffet
entries: {@actSave str} {@dc 20}, each creature in a 15-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} originating from the behemoth. {@actSaveFail} 20 ({@damage 4d6 + 6}) Bludgeoning damage, and the target is pushed 10 feet away. {@actSaveFailBy 5} The target also has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.{@actSaveSuccessOrFail} The behemoth flies up to half its {@variantrule Fly Speed|XPHB|Flying Speed}, and can't use this action again until the start of its next turn.

trait.name: Amorphous
entries: The coldfire ooze can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch without expending extra movement to do so.

trait.name: Coldfire
entries: Cold damage dealt by the coldfire ooze ignores {@variantrule Resistance|XPHB}, and treats {@variantrule Immunity|XPHB} as {@variantrule Resistance|XPHB} instead.

trait.name: Ignite
entries: A creature or flammable object that takes Cold damage from the coldfire ooze ignites. Until the target takes Fire damage, it takes 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Cold damage at the start of each of its turns.

trait.name: Illumination
entries: The coldfire ooze sheds {@variantrule Bright Light|XPHB} in a 20-foot radius and {@variantrule Dim Light|XPHB} for an additional 20 feet.

trait.name: Spider Climb
entries: The coldfire ooze can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

action.name: Pseudopod
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d6 + 2}) Slashing damage plus 14 ({@damage 4d6}) Cold damage.

action.name: Coldfire Flare {@recharge}
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 14}, each creature in a 15-foot {@variantrule Cone [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cone}. {@actSaveFail} 14 ({@damage 4d6}) Cold damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.{@actSaveSuccessOrFail} If a significant amount of flammable material is in the {@variantrule Cone [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Cone}, the area ignites, dealing 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Cold damage to creatures and objects that enter the area for the first time on a turn or end their turn there. A target that takes Cold damage from the area is subjected to Ignite.

reaction.name: Split
entries: {@actTrigger} The coldfire ooze is Medium or Large, has 10+ {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}, and takes Cold and Slashing damage. {@actResponse} The coldfire ooze splits into two new coldfire oozes. Each new ooze has {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} equal to half the original ooze's, rounded down. New oozes are one size smaller than the original ooze.

trait.name: Amphibious
entries: The coral grazer can breathe air and water.

trait.name: Siege Monster
entries: The coral grazer deals double damage to objects and structures.

trait.name: Unnatural Presence
entries: A creature that starts its turn within 30 feet of the coral grazer and can sense it is subjected to the following effect. {@actSave wis} {@dc 17}. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition until the end of the coral grazer's next turn. {@actSaveFailBy 5} While {@condition Frightened|XPHB}, the target has the {@condition Paralyzed|XPHB} condition. {@actSaveSuccess} The target is immune to the Unnatural Presence of all coral grazers for 24 hours.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The coral grazer makes three Bite attacks and uses Horrid Gaze.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 10}, reach 15 ft. {@h}24 ({@damage 4d8 + 6}) Slashing damage.

action.name: Horrid Gaze
entries: The coral grazer fixes its eye on one creature it can see within 120 feet. The creature is subjected to the coral grazer's Unnatural Presence.

trait.name: Hold Breath
entries: Out of water, the coral grazer larva can hold its breath for 30 minutes.

trait.name: Water Breathing
entries: The coral grazer larva can breathe only underwater.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The coral grazer larva makes two Bite attacks.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}10 ({@damage 2d6 + 3}) Slashing damage.

trait.name: Corpse Bound
entries: A corpse wisp can't stray more than 300 feet from the remains that spawned it.

trait.name: Dead Light
entries: The corpse wisp sheds {@variantrule Dim Light|XPHB} in a 20-foot radius.

trait.name: Incorporeal Movement
entries: The corpse wisp can move through other creatures and objects as if they were {@variantrule Difficult Terrain|XPHB}. It takes 5 ({@damage 1d10}) Force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

action.name: Tendril
entries: {@atkr ms} {@hit 7}, reach 15 ft. {@h}4 ({@damage 1d8)}) Necrotic damage, and the target has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 12}). While grappled in this way, the target is {@condition Restrained|XPHB} and cannot regain {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}. A creature that starts its turn {@condition Grappled|XPHB} takes 2 ({@damage 1d4}) Cold damage.

trait.name: Adamantine Jaws
entries: The corpsejaw's Bite attack is considered adamantine, scoring a Critical Hit on a roll of 19 or 20.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d6 + 2}) Piercing damage. {@variantrule Critical Hit|XPHB}: If the target is wearing nonmagical armor, the armor takes a permanent and cumulative -1 penalty to the AC it offers. Armor reduced to an AC of 10 is destroyed.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h}4 ({@damage 1d4 + 2}) Slashing damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature and the corpsejaw moved 20+ feet straight toward it immediately before the hit, the target has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition and the corpsejaw can make a Bite attack against it as a {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB}.

trait.name: Spider Climb
entries: The eye crawler can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

trait.name: Mimicry
entries: The eye crow can mimic simple sounds it has heard, such as a person whispering, a baby crying, or an animal chittering. A creature that hears the sounds can tell they are imitations with a successful {@dc 10} Wisdom ({@skill Insight}) check.

trait.name: Pack Tactics
entries: The eye crow has {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the crow's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Beak
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h}1 Piercing damage. {@variantrule Critical Hit|XPHB}: The target has the {@condition Blinded|XPHB} condition until the end of the eye crow's next turn.

trait.name: Siege Monster
entries: The beetle deals double damage to objects and structures.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 6}, reach 5 ft. {@h}11 ({@damage 2d6 + 4}) Slashing damage.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}1 Piercing damage plus 1 Cold damage. If the target is a creature and takes Cold damage, it can't take {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB|Reactions} until the start of its next turn.

trait.name: Glowing Mane
entries: The goldmane boar sheds {@variantrule Dim Light|XPHB} in a 10-foot Radius.

trait.name: Relentless (Recharges after a Short or Long Rest)
entries: If the goldmane boar take 11 damage or less that would reduce it to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB}, it is reduced to 1 Hit Point instead.

action.name: Tusk
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d8 + 2}) Slashing damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature and the goldmane boar moved 20+ feet straight toward the target immediately before the hit, the target takes an extra 4 ({@damage 1d8}) Slashing damage and has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

trait.name: Spider Climb
entries: The jelly can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

action.name: Pseudopod
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 1}, reach 5 ft. {@h}1 Acid damage.

trait.name: Flyby
entries: The knifewing doesn't provoke {@action Opportunity Attack|XPHB|Opportunity Attacks} when it flies out of an enemy's reach.

trait.name: Glider
entries: The knifewing can't ascend while flying and its altitude decreases by 5 feet for every 30 feet it flies. If flying, the knifewing falls if it doesn't fly at least 30 feet during its turn.

action.name: Knifewing (Flying Only)
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d6 + 2}) Slashing damage.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h}4 ({@damage 1d4 + 2}) Piercing damage.

trait.name: Regrowth
entries: When the mold spider is killed by damage other than Fire damage, it releases spores that grow a new mold spider in 3 days.

trait.name: Spider Climb
entries: The mold spider can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 3}, reach 5 ft. {@h}1 Slashing damage.

trait.name: Hold Breath
entries: The ormwurm can hold its breath for 30 minutes.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 2d4 + 2}) Piercing damage, and if the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 11}). Until this grapple ends, the ormwurm can't Bite another target.

trait.name: Amphibious
entries: The scuttling maw can breathe air and water.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 3}, reach 5 ft. {@h}3 ({@damage 1d4 + 1}) Piercing damage.

action.name: Pincers
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 3}, reach 5 ft. {@h}4 ({@damage 1d6 + 1}) Bludgeoning damage, and if the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 11}). Until this grapple ends, the scuttling maw can't use its Pincers on another target.

bonus.name: Gnash
entries: The scuttling maw makes a Bite attack against a creature it has {@condition Grappled|XPHB}.

action.name: Ram
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}) Bludgeoning damage. If the shieldhead moves 20+ feet straight toward the target immediately before the hit, the target takes an extra 7 ({@damage 2d6}) damage and, if it is Large or smaller, has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The sloth galloper makes two Slam attacks.

action.name: Slam
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}8 ({@damage 2d4 + 3}) Bludgeoning damage.

bonus.name: Speed Burst
entries: The sloth galloper takes the {@action Dash|XPHB} action. It can't move across {@variantrule Difficult Terrain|XPHB} using this movement.

trait.name: Eat Fire
entries: When the torcheater flies through fire, it reduces the fire's area by a 5-foot cube. A fire goes out if its area is reduced to nothing.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h}1 Fire damage.

monster.name: Crawling Grave
languages: understands all languages it knew in life but can't speak

trait.name: Lethal Overrun
entries: If the crawling grave enters the space of a creature that is dead or has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition, it picks up the creature.
